components/StatusBadge.tsx:const StatusBadge: React.FC<StatusBadgeProps> = ({ status, large = false }) => {
components/StatusBadge.tsx:    const baseClasses = "font-semibold rounded-full inline-flex items-center";
components/StatusBadge.tsx:    const sizeClasses = large ? "px-3 py-1 text-sm" : "px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs";
components/StatusBadge.tsx:    let specificClasses = "";
components/StatusBadge.tsx:    let dotClasses = "w-2 h-2 rounded-full mr-2";

components/StatusBadge.tsx:            dotClasses += " bg-green-500";
components/StatusBadge.tsx:            break;
components/StatusBadge.tsx:        case 'Needs Maintenance':
components/StatusBadge.tsx:            specificClasses = "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800 dark:bg-yellow-900 dark:text-yellow-300";
components/StatusBadge.tsx:            dotClasses += " bg-yellow-500";
components/StatusBadge.tsx:            break;
components/StatusBadge.tsx:        case 'Inactive':
components/StatusBadge.tsx:            specificClasses = "bg-gray-100 text-gray-800 dark:bg-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300";
components/StatusBadge.tsx:            dotClasses += " bg-gray-500";
components/StatusBadge.tsx:            break;
components/StatusBadge.tsx:    }
components/StatusBadge.tsx:    return (
components/StatusBadge.tsx:        <span className={`${baseClasses} ${sizeClasses} ${specificClasses}`}>
components/StatusBadge.tsx:            <span className={dotClasses}></span>

components/Reports.tsx:// Mock data generation for the chart
components/Reports.tsx:const generateReportData = (startDate: string, endDate: string): RevenueData[] => {
components/Reports.tsx:    const data: RevenueData[] = [];
components/Reports.tsx:    let current = new Date(startDate);
components/Reports.tsx:    const end = new Date(endDate);
components/Reports.tsx:
components/Reports.tsx:    while (current <= end) {
components/Reports.tsx:        const month = current.toLocaleString('default', { month: 'short' });
components/Reports.tsx:        const billed = 1000000 + Math.random() * 500000;
components/Reports.tsx:        const collected = billed * (0.75 + Math.random() * 0.2);
components/Reports.tsx:        data.push({ month, billed, collected });
components/Reports.tsx:        current.setMonth(current.getMonth() + 1);
components/Reports.tsx:    }
components/Reports.tsx:    return data;
components/Reports.tsx:};

components/Reports.tsx:        end: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
components/Reports.tsx:    });

components/BillingCycleCard.tsx:    const isInitialMount = useRef(true);
components/BillingCycleCard.tsx:

components/BillingCycleCard.tsx:
components/BillingCycleCard.tsx:    useEffect(() => {

components/BillingCycleCard.tsx:        if (!hasChanged) {
components/BillingCycleCard.tsx:            return;
components/BillingCycleCard.tsx:        }
components/BillingCycleCard.tsx:
components/BillingCycleCard.tsx:        setAutoSaveStatus('saving');
components/BillingCycleCard.tsx:        const timer = setTimeout(async () => {
components/BillingCycleCard.tsx:            if (success) {

components/BillingCycleCard.tsx:                setTimeout(() => setAutoSaveStatus('idle'), 2000);
components/BillingCycleCard.tsx:            } else {
components/BillingCycleCard.tsx:                setAutoSaveStatus('idle');

components/BillingCycleCard.tsx:            }
components/BillingCycleCard.tsx:        }, 1500);

components/PaginationControls.tsx:}
components/PaginationControls.tsx:
components/PaginationControls.tsx:const PaginationControls: React.FC<PaginationControlsProps> = ({
components/PaginationControls.tsx:  currentPage,
components/PaginationControls.tsx:  totalPages,
components/PaginationControls.tsx:  totalItems,
components/PaginationControls.tsx:  itemsPerPage,
components/PaginationControls.tsx:  onPageChange,
components/PaginationControls.tsx:}) => {
components/PaginationControls.tsx:  const startIndex = (currentPage - 1) * itemsPerPage + 1;
components/PaginationControls.tsx:  const endIndex = Math.min(startIndex + itemsPerPage - 1, totalItems);
components/PaginationControls.tsx:
components/PaginationControls.tsx:  if (totalPages <= 1) {
components/PaginationControls.tsx:    return null;
components/PaginationControls.tsx:  }
components/PaginationControls.tsx:
components/PaginationControls.tsx:  return (
components/PaginationControls.tsx:    <nav

components/PaginationControls.tsx:          <span className="font-medium">{totalItems}</span> results
components/PaginationControls.tsx:        </p>
components/PaginationControls.tsx:      </div>

components/PaginationControls.tsx:        <button
components/PaginationControls.tsx:          onClick={() => onPageChange(currentPage - 1)}
components/PaginationControls.tsx:          disabled={currentPage === 1}
components/PaginationControls.tsx:          className="relative inline-flex items-center rounded-md border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-gray-700 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"

components/PaginationControls.tsx:        </button>
components/PaginationControls.tsx:        <button
components/PaginationControls.tsx:          onClick={() => onPageChange(currentPage + 1)}
components/PaginationControls.tsx:          disabled={currentPage === totalPages}
components/PaginationControls.tsx:          className="relative ml-3 inline-flex items-center rounded-md border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-gray-700 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"

components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:                issueDate: invoiceToEdit.issueDate,

components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:    
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:    const { subtotal, total } = useMemo(() => {
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        const sub = formData.items.reduce((acc, item) => {
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:            const quantity = Number(item.quantity);
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:            const unitPrice = Number(item.unitPrice);
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:            const lineTotal = (isNaN(quantity) || isNaN(unitPrice)) ? 0 : quantity * unitPrice;
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:            return acc + lineTotal;
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        }, 0);
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        const penalties = isEditMode && invoiceToEdit ? invoiceToEdit.penalties : 0;
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        return { subtotal: sub, total: sub + penalties };
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:    }, [formData.items, isEditMode, invoiceToEdit]);
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:    const handleInputChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement | HTMLSelectElement>) => {

components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:    const parseErrors = (issues: any[]) => {
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        const newErrors: FormErrors = {};
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        issues.forEach(issue => {
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:            const path = issue.path;
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:            let current = newErrors;
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:            path.forEach((key: string | number, index: number) => {
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:                if (index === path.length - 1) {
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:                    current[key] = issue.message;
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:                } else {
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:                    current[key] = current[key] || (typeof path[index + 1] === 'number' ? [] : {});
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:                    current = current[key];
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:                }
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:            });
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        });
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        setErrors(newErrors);
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        const uniqueMessages = [...new Set(issues.map(issue => issue.message))];
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        setErrorSummary(uniqueMessages);
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        showToast('Please fix the errors before proceeding.', 'error');
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:    };
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:    const handleNext = () => {
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        if (currentStep === 1) {
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:            const step1Schema = baseInvoiceSchema.pick({ customerId: true, issueDate: true, dueDate: true }).refine(data => new Date(data.dueDate) >= new Date(data.issueDate), {
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:                message: "Due date cannot be before the issue date.",
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:                path: ["dueDate"],
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:            });
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:            const result = step1Schema.safeParse(formData);
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:            if (!result.success) {
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:                parseErrors(result.error.issues);
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:                return;
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:            }
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        }
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        if (currentStep === 2) {
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:             const step2Schema = baseInvoiceSchema.pick({ items: true });
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:             const result = step2Schema.safeParse(formData);
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:             if(!result.success){
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:                parseErrors(result.error.issues);
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:                return;
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:             }
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        }
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        setErrors({});

components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        setCurrentStep(prev => prev + 1);

components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:    const handleBack = () => {

components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:    const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => {

components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        const result = createInvoiceSchema.safeParse(formData);
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        if (result.success) {
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:            setErrors({});
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:            setErrorSummary([]);
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:            const dataToSave = { ...result.data, status: formData.status };
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:            onSave(dataToSave, invoiceToEdit?.id);
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        } else {
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:            parseErrors(result.error.issues);
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:        }
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:    };
components/CreateInvoiceForm.tsx:

components/AddUserForm.tsx:
components/AddUserForm.tsx:const UserForm: React.FC<UserFormProps> = ({ onSave, onCancel, userToEdit }) => {
components/AddUserForm.tsx:    const isEditMode = !!userToEdit;
components/AddUserForm.tsx:    const [formData, setFormData] = useState<UserFormData & { status?: string }>({
components/AddUserForm.tsx:        name: '',
components/AddUserForm.tsx:        email: '',
components/AddUserForm.tsx:        role: '' as any,
components/AddUserForm.tsx:        status: 'Active'
components/AddUserForm.tsx:    });
components/AddUserForm.tsx:    const [errors, setErrors] = useState<{ [key: string]: string | undefined }>({});
components/AddUserForm.tsx:
components/AddUserForm.tsx:    useEffect(() => {
components/AddUserForm.tsx:        if (userToEdit) {
components/AddUserForm.tsx:            setFormData({
components/AddUserForm.tsx:                name: userToEdit.name,
components/AddUserForm.tsx:                email: userToEdit.email,
components/AddUserForm.tsx:                role: userToEdit.role as any,
components/AddUserForm.tsx:                status: userToEdit.status
components/AddUserForm.tsx:            });
components/AddUserForm.tsx:        }
components/AddUserForm.tsx:    }, [userToEdit]);
components/AddUserForm.tsx:
components/AddUserForm.tsx:    const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement | HTMLSelectElement>) => {
components/AddUserForm.tsx:        const { name, value } = e.target;
components/AddUserForm.tsx:        setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: value }));
components/AddUserForm.tsx:        if (errors[name]) {
components/AddUserForm.tsx:            setErrors(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: undefined }));
components/AddUserForm.tsx:        }
components/AddUserForm.tsx:    };
components/AddUserForm.tsx:
components/AddUserForm.tsx:    const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
components/AddUserForm.tsx:        e.preventDefault();
components/AddUserForm.tsx:        const result = userSchema.safeParse(formData);
components/AddUserForm.tsx:        if (!result.success) {
components/AddUserForm.tsx:            const newErrors: { [key: string]: string } = {};
components/AddUserForm.tsx:            result.error.issues.forEach(issue => {
components/AddUserForm.tsx:                if (typeof issue.path[0] === 'string') {
components/AddUserForm.tsx:                    newErrors[issue.path[0]] = issue.message;
components/AddUserForm.tsx:                }
components/AddUserForm.tsx:            });
components/AddUserForm.tsx:            setErrors(newErrors);
components/AddUserForm.tsx:        } else {
components/AddUserForm.tsx:            onSave({ ...result.data, status: formData.status });
components/AddUserForm.tsx:        }
components/AddUserForm.tsx:    };
components/AddUserForm.tsx:
components/AddUserForm.tsx:    const isFormValid = useMemo(() => userSchema.safeParse(formData).success, [formData]);
components/AddUserForm.tsx:
components/AddUserForm.tsx:    return (
components/AddUserForm.tsx:        <Modal title={isEditMode ? "Edit System User" : "Create System User"} onClose={onCancel} className="max-w-md">

components/AddUserForm.tsx:                <div className="p-6 space-y-4">
components/AddUserForm.tsx:                    <div>
components/AddUserForm.tsx:                        <label htmlFor="name" className="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300 mb-1">Full Name</label>
components/AddUserForm.tsx:                        <Input 
components/AddUserForm.tsx:                            type="text" 
components/AddUserForm.tsx:                            name="name" 
components/AddUserForm.tsx:                            id="name"

components/PaymentsTable.tsx:
components/PaymentsTable.tsx:    const getIcon = () => {

components/PaymentsTable.tsx:        if (sortDirection === 'ascending') return <ChevronUpIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200" />;

components/PaymentsTable.tsx:        <th scope="col" className={`px-6 py-4 ${className}`}>

components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:    
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:    const [config, setConfig] = useState({
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:        issueDate: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:        dueDate: new Date(Date.now() + 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString().split('T')[0],
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:        unitPrice: 110,
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:    });
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:    const fetchPreview = async () => {
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:        setLoading(true);
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:        try {
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:            setBillableItems(data.map((item: any) => ({ ...item, isSelected: true })));
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:            setStep(2);
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:        } catch (err: any) {
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:            showToast(err.message || 'Failed to fetch billing preview.', 'error');
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:        } finally {
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:            setLoading(false);
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:        }
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:    };
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:    const handleRunBilling = async () => {
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:        const selected = billableItems.filter(item => item.isSelected);
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:        if (selected.length === 0) {
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:            showToast('No customers selected for billing.', 'error');
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:            return;
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:        }
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:        setStep(3);

components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:        try {
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:            // Simulated progress steps
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:            setProgress(40);
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:            
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                method: 'POST',
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                body: JSON.stringify({
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                    batch: selected,
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                    issueDate: config.issueDate,
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                    dueDate: config.dueDate,
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                    unitPrice: config.unitPrice
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                }),
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:            });
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:            setProgress(100);
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:            showToast(`Successfully generated ${selected.length} invoices.`, 'success');
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:            setTimeout(onComplete, 1000);
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:        } catch (err: any) {

components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:            setProcessing(false);

components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:        newItems[index].isSelected = !newItems[index].isSelected;

components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                        </motion.div>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                    )}
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                    {step === 2 && (
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                        <motion.div 
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                            initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                            className="space-y-4"
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                        >
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/20 p-4 rounded-lg border border-blue-100 dark:border-blue-800">
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                    <div className="p-2 bg-blue-500 rounded-full text-white">
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                        <CheckCircleIcon className="w-5 h-5" />
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                    </div>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                    <div>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                        <p className="font-bold text-blue-900 dark:text-blue-100">{totalSelected} Customers Billable</p>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                        <p className="text-xs text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-300">Total Projected Revenue: KES {totalAmount.toLocaleString()}</p>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                    </div>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                </div>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => setBillableItems(billableItems.map(i => ({...i, isSelected: true})))}>Select All</Button>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                            </div>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                            <div className="border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                <table className="w-full text-sm text-left">
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                    <thead className="bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 text-slate-500 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest">
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                        <tr>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                            <th className="px-4 py-3 text-center">Bill?</th>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                            <th className="px-4 py-3">Customer</th>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                            <th className="px-4 py-3">Meter</th>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                            <th className="px-4 py-3 text-right">Consumption</th>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                            <th className="px-4 py-3 text-right">Estimated Total</th>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                        </tr>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                    </thead>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                    <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-100 dark:divide-slate-800 bg-white dark:bg-slate-900">
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                        {billableItems.map((item, idx) => (
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                            <tr key={item.customerId} className={`hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800/30 ${!item.isSelected && 'opacity-50'}`}>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                                <td className="px-4 py-3 text-center">
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                                    <input type="checkbox" checked={item.isSelected} onChange={() => toggleSelection(idx)} className="rounded text-blue-600 focus:ring-blue-500" />
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                                </td>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                                <td className="px-4 py-3">
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                                    <p className="font-medium">{item.name}</p>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                                    <p className="text-[10px] font-mono text-slate-400">{item.accountNumber}</p>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                                </td>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                                <td className="px-4 py-3">
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                                        <DropletIcon className="w-3 h-3 text-slate-400" />
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                                        <span className="font-mono text-xs">{item.serialNumber}</span>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                                    </div>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                                </td>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                                <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right font-bold">
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                                    {item.consumption} m³
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                                    <p className="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400">Prev: {item.previousReading}</p>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                                </td>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                                <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right font-black text-blue-600">
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                                    KES {item.total.toLocaleString()}
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                                </td>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                            </tr>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                        ))}
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                    </tbody>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                </table>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                            </div>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                        </motion.div>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                    )}
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                    {step === 3 && (
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                        <motion.div 
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                            initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                            className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-20 space-y-6"
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                        >
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                            <div className="relative w-24 h-24">
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                <svg className="w-full h-full" viewBox="0 0 100 100">
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                    <circle className="text-slate-200 dark:text-slate-800 stroke-current" strokeWidth="8" cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="transparent"></circle>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                    <circle className="text-blue-500 stroke-current transition-all duration-500" strokeWidth="8" strokeLinecap="round" cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="transparent" strokeDasharray="251.2" strokeDashoffset={251.2 - (251.2 * progress) / 100}></circle>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                </svg>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-xl">{progress}%</div>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                            </div>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                            <div className="text-center">
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                <h3 className="text-lg font-bold">Generating Batch Invoices</h3>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                                <p className="text-sm text-slate-500">Creating records, calculating taxes, and preparing PDF manifests...</p>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                            </div>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                        </motion.div>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                    )}
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                </AnimatePresence>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:            </div>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:            <div className="p-4 border-t border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 flex justify-between items-center bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-900/50 rounded-b-xl">
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                <Button variant="ghost" onClick={onClose} disabled={processing}>Cancel</Button>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                <div className="flex gap-3">
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                    {step === 2 && <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setStep(1)}>Back</Button>}
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                    {step === 1 && (
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                        <Button variant="primary" onClick={fetchPreview} disabled={loading}>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                            {loading ? 'Analyzing...' : 'Identify Billable Customers'}
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                        </Button>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                    )}
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                    {step === 2 && (
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                        <Button variant="primary" onClick={handleRunBilling}>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                            Execute Generation ({totalSelected})
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                        </Button>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                    )}
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                </div>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:            </div>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:            <style>{`
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                .input-field { 
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                    display: block; width: 100%; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; 
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                    background-color: #f8fafc; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.875rem; 
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:                }

components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:            `}</style>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:        </Modal>
components/BulkBillingWizard.tsx:    );

components/MeterImportWizard.tsx:        if (lines.length < 2) {

components/Login.tsx:
components/Login.tsx:const Login: React.FC<LoginProps> = ({ onLogin }) => {
components/Login.tsx:  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
components/Login.tsx:  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
components/Login.tsx:  const [newPassword, setNewPassword] = useState('');
components/Login.tsx:  const [confirmPassword, setConfirmPassword] = useState('');
components/Login.tsx:  const [error, setError] = useState('');
components/Login.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
components/Login.tsx:  const [requirePasswordChange, setRequirePasswordChange] = useState(false);
components/Login.tsx:  const [tempUser, setTempUser] = useState<any>(null);
components/Login.tsx:
components/Login.tsx:  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
components/Login.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
components/Login.tsx:    setError('');
components/Login.tsx:    setLoading(true);
components/Login.tsx:
components/Login.tsx:    try {
components/Login.tsx:      if (requirePasswordChange) {
components/Login.tsx:        if (newPassword !== confirmPassword) {
components/Login.tsx:          setError('Passwords do not match');
components/Login.tsx:          setLoading(false);
components/Login.tsx:          return;
components/Login.tsx:        }
components/Login.tsx:        if (newPassword.length < 8) {
components/Login.tsx:          setError('Password must be at least 8 characters');
components/Login.tsx:          setLoading(false);
components/Login.tsx:          return;
components/Login.tsx:        }
components/Login.tsx:
components/Login.tsx:          method: 'POST',
components/Login.tsx:          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
components/Login.tsx:          body: JSON.stringify({ userId: tempUser.id, oldPassword: password, newPassword })
components/Login.tsx:        });
components/Login.tsx:        
components/Login.tsx:        if (response.ok && data.success) {
components/Login.tsx:          localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(tempUser));
components/Login.tsx:          localStorage.setItem('token', data.token);
components/Login.tsx:          onLogin();
components/Login.tsx:        } else {
components/Login.tsx:          setError(data.message || 'Failed to change password.');
components/Login.tsx:        }
components/Login.tsx:      } else {
components/Login.tsx:          method: 'POST',
components/Login.tsx:          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
components/Login.tsx:          body: JSON.stringify({ email, password })
components/Login.tsx:        });
components/Login.tsx:        
components/Login.tsx:        
components/Login.tsx:        if (response.ok && data.success) {
components/Login.tsx:          if (data.requirePasswordChange) {
components/Login.tsx:            setRequirePasswordChange(true);
components/Login.tsx:            setTempUser(data.user);
components/Login.tsx:          } else {
components/Login.tsx:            localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(data.user));
components/Login.tsx:            localStorage.setItem('token', data.token);
components/Login.tsx:            onLogin();
components/Login.tsx:          }
components/Login.tsx:        } else {
components/Login.tsx:          setError(data.message || 'Invalid email or password.');
components/Login.tsx:        }
components/Login.tsx:      }
components/Login.tsx:    } catch (err: any) {
components/Login.tsx:      setError('Network error. Please ensure the server is running.');
components/Login.tsx:    } finally {
components/Login.tsx:      setLoading(false);
components/Login.tsx:    }
components/Login.tsx:  };

components/Login.tsx:  return (

components/RecentPayments.tsx:const RecentPayments: React.FC<RecentPaymentsProps> = ({ payments, setActiveView }) => {
components/RecentPayments.tsx:  const [sortConfig, setSortConfig] = useState<SortConfig>({ key: 'date', direction: 'descending' });
components/RecentPayments.tsx:
components/RecentPayments.tsx:  const handleSort = (key: keyof RecentPayment) => {
components/RecentPayments.tsx:      let direction: 'ascending' | 'descending' = 'ascending';
components/RecentPayments.tsx:      if (sortConfig && sortConfig.key === key && sortConfig.direction === 'ascending') {
components/RecentPayments.tsx:          direction = 'descending';
components/RecentPayments.tsx:      }
components/RecentPayments.tsx:      setSortConfig({ key, direction });
components/RecentPayments.tsx:  };
components/RecentPayments.tsx:
components/RecentPayments.tsx:  const sortedPayments = useMemo(() => {
components/RecentPayments.tsx:      let sortableItems = [...payments];
components/RecentPayments.tsx:      if (sortConfig !== null) {
components/RecentPayments.tsx:          sortableItems.sort((a, b) => {
components/RecentPayments.tsx:              const aValue = a[sortConfig.key];
components/RecentPayments.tsx:              const bValue = b[sortConfig.key];
components/RecentPayments.tsx:              let comparison = 0;
components/RecentPayments.tsx:
components/RecentPayments.tsx:              if (sortConfig.key === 'amount') {
components/RecentPayments.tsx:                  comparison = (aValue as number) - (bValue as number);
components/RecentPayments.tsx:              } else if (sortConfig.key === 'date') {
components/RecentPayments.tsx:                  comparison = new Date(aValue as string).getTime() - new Date(bValue as string).getTime();
components/RecentPayments.tsx:              } else {
components/RecentPayments.tsx:                  comparison = String(aValue).localeCompare(String(bValue));
components/RecentPayments.tsx:              }
components/RecentPayments.tsx:              
components/RecentPayments.tsx:              return sortConfig.direction === 'ascending' ? comparison : -comparison;
components/RecentPayments.tsx:          });
components/RecentPayments.tsx:      }
components/RecentPayments.tsx:      return sortableItems;
components/RecentPayments.tsx:  }, [payments, sortConfig]);

components/Toast.tsx:
components/Toast.tsx:const Toast: React.FC<ToastProps> = ({ message, type, onClose }) => {

components/Toast.tsx:

components/Toast.tsx:    }, 4500); // Start fade out before it's removed by parent

components/Toast.tsx:

components/Toast.tsx:  };

components/Toast.tsx:    </svg>
components/Toast.tsx:  ) : (
components/Toast.tsx:    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-6 w-6 text-white" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">

components/Toast.tsx:  return (

components/AddMeterForm.tsx:    const [formData, setFormData] = useState<FormData>({

components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        customerAccount: '',
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        installationDate: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        initialReading: 0,
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:    });
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:    const [errors, setErrors] = useState<FormErrors>({});
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:    useEffect(() => {
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        if (isEditMode && meterToEdit) {
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:            setFormData({
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:                serialNumber: meterToEdit.serialNumber,
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:                customerAccount: meterToEdit.customerAccount || '',
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:                installationDate: meterToEdit.installationDate,
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:                initialReading: 0, // Not used in edit mode, but part of state shape
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:            });
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        }
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:    }, [meterToEdit, isEditMode]);
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:    const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        const { name, value } = e.target;
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: value }));
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        if (errors[name as keyof FormErrors]) {
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:            setErrors(prev => ({ ...prev, [name as keyof FormErrors]: undefined }));
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        }
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:    };
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:    const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        e.preventDefault();
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        const dataToValidate = {
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:            ...formData,
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:            // Zod expects null for optional fields that are empty strings
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:            customerAccount: formData.customerAccount === '' ? null : formData.customerAccount,
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        };
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        const schema = isEditMode ? editMeterSchema : addMeterSchema;
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        const result = schema.safeParse(dataToValidate);
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        if (!result.success) {
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:            const newErrors: FormErrors = {};
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:            for (const issue of result.error.issues) {
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:                const path = issue.path[0] as keyof FormErrors;
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:                newErrors[path] = issue.message;
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:            }
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:            setErrors(newErrors);
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:            showToast('Please fix the errors in the form.', 'error');
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        } else {
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:            setErrors({});
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:            onSave(result.data, meterToEdit?.id);
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        }
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:    };
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:    const isFormValid = useMemo(() => {
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        const dataToValidate = {
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:            ...formData,
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:            customerAccount: formData.customerAccount === '' ? null : formData.customerAccount,
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        };
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        const schema = isEditMode ? editMeterSchema : addMeterSchema;
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:        return schema.safeParse(dataToValidate).success;
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:    }, [formData, isEditMode]);
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:
components/AddMeterForm.tsx:    return (

components/ChangePassword.tsx:import { Button } from './ui/Button';

components/ChangePassword.tsx:

components/ChangePassword.tsx:
components/ChangePassword.tsx:const ChangePassword: React.FC<ChangePasswordProps> = ({ email, onSuccess }) => {
components/ChangePassword.tsx:  const [oldPassword, setOldPassword] = useState('');
components/ChangePassword.tsx:  const [newPassword, setNewPassword] = useState('');
components/ChangePassword.tsx:  const [confirmPassword, setConfirmPassword] = useState('');
components/ChangePassword.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
components/ChangePassword.tsx:  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
components/ChangePassword.tsx:
components/ChangePassword.tsx:  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
components/ChangePassword.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
components/ChangePassword.tsx:    setError(null);
components/ChangePassword.tsx:
components/ChangePassword.tsx:    if (newPassword.length < 8) {
components/ChangePassword.tsx:      setError('New password must be at least 8 characters long.');
components/ChangePassword.tsx:      return;
components/ChangePassword.tsx:    }
components/ChangePassword.tsx:    if (newPassword !== confirmPassword) {
components/ChangePassword.tsx:      setError('New password and confirmation do not match.');
components/ChangePassword.tsx:      return;
components/ChangePassword.tsx:    }
components/ChangePassword.tsx:
components/ChangePassword.tsx:    setLoading(true);
components/ChangePassword.tsx:    try {
components/ChangePassword.tsx:        method: 'POST',
components/ChangePassword.tsx:        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
components/ChangePassword.tsx:        body: JSON.stringify({ email, oldPassword, newPassword }),
components/ChangePassword.tsx:      });
components/ChangePassword.tsx:      if (!response.ok || !data.success) {
components/ChangePassword.tsx:        throw new Error(data.message || 'Password change failed.');
components/ChangePassword.tsx:      }
components/ChangePassword.tsx:      localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(data.user));
components/ChangePassword.tsx:      onSuccess(data.user);
components/ChangePassword.tsx:    } catch (err: any) {
components/ChangePassword.tsx:      setError(err.message || 'Password change failed.');
components/ChangePassword.tsx:    } finally {
components/ChangePassword.tsx:      setLoading(false);
components/ChangePassword.tsx:    }
components/ChangePassword.tsx:  };
components/ChangePassword.tsx:
components/ChangePassword.tsx:  return (
components/ChangePassword.tsx:    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-950 p-4">

components/ChangePassword.tsx:          <CardTitle>Change Temporary Password</CardTitle>
components/ChangePassword.tsx:          <CardDescription>
components/ChangePassword.tsx:            For security, this account needs a new password before continuing.
components/ChangePassword.tsx:          </CardDescription>
components/ChangePassword.tsx:        </CardHeader>
components/ChangePassword.tsx:        <CardContent>
components/ChangePassword.tsx:          {error && (
components/ChangePassword.tsx:            <div className="mb-4 rounded-lg border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-red-700 dark:border-red-900 dark:bg-red-950/30 dark:text-red-300">
components/ChangePassword.tsx:              {error}
components/ChangePassword.tsx:            </div>
components/ChangePassword.tsx:          )}
components/ChangePassword.tsx:          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
components/ChangePassword.tsx:            <div>
components/ChangePassword.tsx:              <label className="mb-1 block text-sm font-medium">Current Password</label>
components/ChangePassword.tsx:              <Input type="password" value={oldPassword} onChange={(e) => setOldPassword(e.target.value)} required />
components/ChangePassword.tsx:            </div>
components/ChangePassword.tsx:            <div>
components/ChangePassword.tsx:              <label className="mb-1 block text-sm font-medium">New Password</label>

components/ChangePassword.tsx:            </div>

components/ChangePassword.tsx:            </div>
components/ChangePassword.tsx:            <Button type="submit" className="w-full" disabled={loading}>

components/ChangePassword.tsx:            </Button>
components/ChangePassword.tsx:          </form>
components/ChangePassword.tsx:        </CardContent>
components/ChangePassword.tsx:      </Card>

components/AddReadingForm.tsx:import React, { useState } from 'react';
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:import { readingSchema, ReadingFormData } from '../lib/schemas';
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:interface AddReadingFormProps {
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:    onSave: (data: ReadingFormData) => void;
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:    onCancel: () => void;
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:    lastReading?: number;
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:}
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:type FormErrors = { [key: string]: string | undefined };
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:const AddReadingForm: React.FC<AddReadingFormProps> = ({ onSave, onCancel, lastReading }) => {
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:    const [formData, setFormData] = useState<ReadingFormData>({
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:        reading: lastReading ?? 0,
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:        date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:    });
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:    const [errors, setErrors] = useState<FormErrors>({});
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:    const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:        const { name, value } = e.target;
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:        setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: value }));
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:        if (errors[name]) {
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:            setErrors(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: undefined }));
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:        }
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:    };
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:    const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:        e.preventDefault();
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:        
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:        const validationSchema = readingSchema.refine(data => data.reading >= (lastReading ?? 0), {
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:            message: `Reading must be >= last reading (${lastReading?.toLocaleString()}).`,
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:            path: ['reading'],
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:        });
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:        const result = validationSchema.safeParse(formData);
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:        if (!result.success) {
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:            const newErrors: FormErrors = {};
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:            for (const issue of result.error.issues) {
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:                const path = issue.path[0];
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:                if (typeof path === 'string') {
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:                    newErrors[path] = issue.message;
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:                }
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:            }
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:            setErrors(newErrors);
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:        } else {
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:            setErrors({});
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:            onSave(result.data);
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:        }
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:    };
components/AddReadingForm.tsx:

components/LiveAssistant.tsx:// --- Audio Utility Functions ---
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:// Base64 encoding
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:function encode(bytes: Uint8Array) {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  let binary = '';
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  const len = bytes.byteLength;
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  for (let i = 0; i < len; i++) {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    binary += String.fromCharCode(bytes[i]);
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  }
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  return btoa(binary);
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:}
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:// Base64 decoding
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:function decode(base64: string) {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  const binaryString = atob(base64);
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  const len = binaryString.length;
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  const bytes = new Uint8Array(len);
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  for (let i = 0; i < len; i++) {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    bytes[i] = binaryString.charCodeAt(i);
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  }
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  return bytes;
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:}
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:// Decode raw PCM data into an AudioBuffer
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:async function decodeAudioData(data: Uint8Array, ctx: AudioContext, sampleRate: number, numChannels: number): Promise<AudioBuffer> {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  const dataInt16 = new Int16Array(data.buffer);
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  const frameCount = dataInt16.length / numChannels;
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  const buffer = ctx.createBuffer(numChannels, frameCount, sampleRate);
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  for (let channel = 0; channel < numChannels; channel++) {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    const channelData = buffer.getChannelData(channel);
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    for (let i = 0; i < frameCount; i++) {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:      channelData[i] = dataInt16[i * numChannels + channel] / 32768.0;
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    }
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  }
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  return buffer;
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:}
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:function createBlob(data: Float32Array): { data: string; mimeType: string } {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  const l = data.length;
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  const int16 = new Int16Array(l);
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  for (let i = 0; i < l; i++) {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    int16[i] = data[i] * 32768;
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  }
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  return {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    data: encode(new Uint8Array(int16.buffer)),
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    mimeType: 'audio/pcm;rate=16000',
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  };
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:}

components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  const nextStartTimeRef = useRef<number>(0);

components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  const transcriptEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  const cleanUp = useCallback(() => {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    // Close session
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    if (sessionPromiseRef.current) {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:        sessionPromiseRef.current.then(session => session.close());
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:        sessionPromiseRef.current = null;
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    }

components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    streamRef.current?.getTracks().forEach(track => track.stop());
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    streamRef.current = null;
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    // Disconnect and close audio contexts
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    scriptProcessorRef.current?.disconnect();
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    mediaStreamSourceRef.current?.disconnect();
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    inputAudioContextRef.current?.close();
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    outputAudioContextRef.current?.close();
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    // Clear audio playback queue
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    outputSourcesRef.current.forEach(source => source.stop());
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    outputSourcesRef.current.clear();
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  }, []);
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:  const startSession = async () => {

components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    setCurrentInput('');
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    setCurrentOutput('');
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    setTranscript([]);
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    try {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    } catch (err) {

components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    inputAudioContextRef.current = new (window.AudioContext || (window as any).webkitAudioContext)({ sampleRate: 16000 });

components/LiveAssistant.tsx:
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey: process.env.API_KEY as string });
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:    sessionPromiseRef.current = ai.live.connect({
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:        model: 'gemini-2.5-flash-native-audio-preview-09-2025',
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:        config: {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:            responseModalities: [Modality.AUDIO],
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:            inputAudioTranscription: {},

components/LiveAssistant.tsx:        },
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:        callbacks: {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:            onopen: () => {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                const inputCtx = inputAudioContextRef.current!;
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                mediaStreamSourceRef.current = inputCtx.createMediaStreamSource(streamRef.current!);

components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                setStatus('listening');
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:            },
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:            onmessage: async (message: LiveServerMessage) => {

components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                if (message.serverContent?.inputTranscription) {

components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                }
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                if (message.serverContent?.outputTranscription) {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                    setCurrentOutput(prev => prev + message.serverContent!.outputTranscription!.text);
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                }
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                if (message.serverContent?.turnComplete) {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                    setTranscript(prev => [
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                        ...prev,
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                        { speaker: 'user', text: currentInput.trim() },
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                        { speaker: 'model', text: currentOutput.trim() }
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                    ]);
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                    setCurrentInput('');
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                    setCurrentOutput('');
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                }
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                // Handle audio playback
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                const audioData = message.serverContent?.modelTurn?.parts[0]?.inlineData.data;
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                if (audioData) {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                    const outputCtx = outputAudioContextRef.current!;
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                    setStatus('speaking');
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                    nextStartTimeRef.current = Math.max(nextStartTimeRef.current, outputCtx.currentTime);
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                    
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                    const source = outputCtx.createBufferSource();
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                    source.buffer = audioBuffer;
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                    source.connect(outputCtx.destination);
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                    source.addEventListener('ended', () => {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                        outputSourcesRef.current.delete(source);
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                        if (outputSourcesRef.current.size === 0) {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                            setStatus('listening');
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                        }
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                    });
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                    source.start(nextStartTimeRef.current);
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                    nextStartTimeRef.current += audioBuffer.duration;
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                    outputSourcesRef.current.add(source);
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                }
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                if (message.serverContent?.interrupted) {
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                    outputSourcesRef.current.forEach(source => source.stop());
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                    outputSourcesRef.current.clear();

components/LiveAssistant.tsx:                }
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:            },
components/LiveAssistant.tsx:            onerror: (e) => {

components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:const AddCustomerForm: React.FC<CustomerFormProps> = ({ onSave, onCancel, customerToEdit }) => {
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:    const isEditMode = !!customerToEdit;
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:    
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:    const [formData, setFormData] = useState<CustomerFormData>({

components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:        phone: '+254',
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:        address: '',

components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:                phone: customerToEdit.phone,
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:                address: customerToEdit.address,
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:            });
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:        }
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:    }, [customerToEdit, isEditMode]);
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:    const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement | HTMLTextAreaElement>) => {
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:        const { name, value } = e.target;
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:        setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: value }));
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:        if (errors[name]) {
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:            setErrors(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: undefined }));
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:        }
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:    };
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:    
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:    const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:        e.preventDefault();
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:        const result = customerSchema.safeParse(formData);
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:        if (!result.success) {
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:            const newErrors: FormErrors = {};
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:            for (const issue of result.error.issues) {
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:                const path = issue.path[0];
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:                if (typeof path === 'string') {
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:                    newErrors[path] = issue.message;
components/AddCustomerForm.tsx:                }

components/Header.tsx:        if (data && data.unreadCount !== undefined) {
components/Header.tsx:          setUnreadCount(data.unreadCount);

components/Header.tsx:      }
components/Header.tsx:    };
components/Header.tsx:    
components/Header.tsx:    fetchUnreadCount();
components/Header.tsx:    // Poll every 30 seconds
components/Header.tsx:    const interval = setInterval(fetchUnreadCount, 30000);
components/Header.tsx:    return () => clearInterval(interval);
components/Header.tsx:  }, []);
components/Header.tsx:
components/Header.tsx:  const handleLogout = () => {

     FROM months ORDER BY m ASC\n        `).all();\n\n        const agingData = [\n            { name: '0-30 Days', value: db.prepare(\"SELECT SUM(total) as v FROM invoices WHERE status = 'Due' AND agingData,\n            defaulters,\n            recentPayments,\n            nrwData: [\n                { day: 'Mon', percentage: 18.5 }, { day: 'Tue', percentage: 19.2 }, { day: 'Wed', percentage: try {\n        const { q, sortKey, sortDir, page = 1, limit = 10 } = req.query;\n        let query = 'SELECT * FROM customers';\n        const params = [];\n        if (q) {\n            query += ' WHERE name LIKE ? OR accountNumber LIKE ? OR email LIKE ?';\n            params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n        }\n        if (sortKey && sortDir) {\n            query += ` ORDER BY ${sortKey} ${sortDir === 'descending' ? 'DESC' : 'ASC'}`;\n        } else {\n             query += ` ORDER BY joinDate DESC`;\n        }\n        const totalItemsQuery = q \n            ? 'SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM customers WHERE name LIKE ? OR accountNumber LIKE ? OR email LIKE ?'\n            : 'SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM customers';\n        const totalItems = db.prepare(totalItemsQuery).get(q ? OFFSET ?';\n            params.push(parsedLimit, (parsedPage - 1) * parsedLimit);\n        }\n        const customers = db.prepare(query).all(...params);\n        res.json({ customers, totalItems });\n    } catch (error) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to fetch customers', error: error.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.get('/api/customers/:id', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        const customer = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM customers WHERE id = ?').get(req.params.id);\n        if (!customer) return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Customer not found' });\n        const invoices = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM invoices WHERE customerAccount = ? ORDER BY issueDate DESC').all(customer.accountNumber);\n        const payments = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM payments WHERE customerName = ? ORDER BY date DESC').all(customer.name);\n        const meters = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM meters WHERE customerAccount = ?').all(customer.accountNumber);\n        const outstandingBalance = db.prepare(\"SELECT SUM(total) as totalDue FROM invoices WHERE customerAccount = ? AND status IN ('Due', 'Overdue')\").get(customer.accountNumber).totalDue || 0;\n        res.json({ customer, history: { invoices, payments }, meters, outstandingBalance, lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString() });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to fetch customer profile', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.post('/api/customers', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        const { name, email, phone, address } = req.body;\n        const last = db.prepare(\"SELECT id FROM customers ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1\").get();\n        const nextIdNum = last ? parseInt(last.id.split('-')[1]) + 1 : 1001;\n        const id = `CUST-${nextIdNum}`;\n        const acc = `ACC-${20000 + nextIdNum}`;\n        db.prepare('INSERT INTO customers (id, accountNumber, name, email, phone, address, joinDate) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)')\n          .run(id, acc, name, email, phone, address, new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]);\n        res.status(201).json({ id, accountNumber: acc });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to create customer', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.put('/api/customers/:id', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        const { name, email, phone, address } = req.body;\n        db.prepare('UPDATE customers SET name = ?, email = ?, phone = ?, address = ? OR customerName LIKE ? AND date <= ? ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1\").get(item.meterId, item.lastInvoiceDate)\n                : db.prepare(\"SELECT reading FROM meter_readings WHERE meterId = ? ORDER BY date ASC LIMIT 1\").get(item.meterId);\n            const prev = r ? r.reading : 0;\n            const cons = Math.max(0, item.currentReading - prev);\n            return { ...item, OR accountNumber LIKE ? OFFSET ?';\n    params.push(parseInt(limit), (parseInt(page) - 1) * parseInt(limit));\n    const payments = db.prepare(query).all(...params);\n    res.json({ payments, totalItems });\n});\n\napp.post('/api/payments', (req, res) => {\n    const { invoiceId, amount, method, date } = req.body;\n    try {\n        const invoice = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM invoices WHERE id = ?').get(invoiceId);\n        if (!invoice) {\n            return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Invoice not found' });\n        }\n        if (invoice.status === 'Paid') {\n            return res.status(400).json({ message: 'This invoice has already been paid.' });\n        }\n\n        db.transaction(() => {\n            // Update invoice status to 'Paid'\n            db.prepare('UPDATE invoices SET status = ? WHERE id = ?').run('Paid', invoiceId);\n\n            // Create the payment record\n            const newPaymentId = `RPT-${Date.now()}`;\n            db.prepare('INSERT INTO payments (id, customerName, amount, method, date, invoiceId) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)')\n              .run(newPaymentId, invoice.customerName, amount, method, date, invoiceId);\n        })();\n        \n        res.status(201).json({ message: 'Payment recorded successfully.' });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to record payment', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n// --- SETTINGS ---\napp.get('/api/settings/billing', (req, res) => {\n    const settings = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM billing_settings WHERE id = 1').get();\n    res.json(settings);\n});\n\napp.post('/api/settings/billing', (req, res) => {\n    const { frequency, generationDay, readingCutoffDays } = req.body;\n    db.prepare('UPDATE billing_settings SET frequency = ?, generationDay = ?, readingCutoffDays = ? WHERE id = 1')\n      .run(frequency, generationDay, readingCutoffDays);\n    res.status(200).json({ message: 'Settings updated' });\n});\n\n// --- USERS ---\napp.get('/api/users', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        const users = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY name ASC').all();\n        res.json(users);\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to fetch users', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.post('/api/users', (req, res) => {\n    const { name, email, role } = req.body;\n    try {\n        const id = `USR-${Date.now()}`;\n        const lastActive = new Date().toISOString();\n        db.prepare('INSERT INTO users (id, name, email, role, lastActive) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)')\n          .run(id, name, email, role, lastActive);\n        res.status(201).json({ id, name, email, role, lastActive });\n    } catch (err) {\n        if (err.message.includes('UNIQUE constraint failed')) {\n            return res.status(400).json({ message: 'A user with this email already exists.' });\n        }\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to create user', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.delete('/api/users/:id', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        db.prepare('DELETE FROM users WHERE id = ?').run(req.params.id);\n        res.status(200).json({ message: 'User deleted' });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to delete user', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n\napp.listen(PORT, () => {\n    console.log(`Server is running on http://localhost:${PORT}`);\n});\n"

            SELECT date(m, '-1 month') FROM months WHERE m > date('now', 'start of month', '-5 months')\n            )\n            SELECT\n                strftime('%b', m) as month,\n                (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total), 0) FROM invoices WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', issueDate) = strftime('%Y-%m', m)) as billed,\n                (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payments WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', date) = strftime('%Y-%m', m)) as collected\n            FROM months ORDER BY m ASC\n        `).all();\n\n        // Debt Aging\n        const agingData = [\n            { name: '0-30 Days', value: name: '61-90 Days', value: db.prepare(\"SELECT SUM(total) as v FROM invoices WHERE status = 'Overdue' AND dueDate BETWEEN date('now', '-90 days') AND date('now', '-61 days')\").get().v || 0, fill:
