---\napp.get('/api/customers', (req, res) => {\n    const { q, sortKey, sortDir, page = 1, limit = 10 } = req.query;\n    let query = 'SELECT * FROM customers';\n    const params = [];\n\n    if (q) {\n        query += ' WHERE name LIKE ? OR accountNumber LIKE ? OR email LIKE ?';\n        params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    }\n\n    if (sortKey && sortDir) {\n        const allowedKeys = ['name', 'accountNumber', 'email', 'address', 'joinDate'];\n        if (allowedKeys.includes(sortKey)) {\n            query += ` ORDER BY ${sortKey} ${sortDir === 'descending' ? 'DESC' : 'ASC'}`;\n        }\n    } else {\n         query += ` ORDER BY joinDate DESC`;\n    }\n\n    const totalStmt = db.prepare(query.replace('SELECT *', 'SELECT COUNT(*) as count')).all(...params);\n    const totalItems = totalStmt[0].count;\n\n    if (limit !== '1000') {\n        query += ' LIMIT ? OFFSET ?';\n        params.push(parseInt(limit), (parseInt(page) - 1) * parseInt(limit));\n    }\n\n    const customers = db.prepare(query).all(...params);\n    res.json({ customers, totalItems });\n});\n\napp.get('/api/customers/:id', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        const customer = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM customers WHERE id = ?').get(req.params.id);\n        if (!customer) {\n            return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Customer not found' });\n        }\n\n        const invoices = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM invoices WHERE customerAccount = ? ORDER BY issueDate DESC').all(customer.accountNumber);\n        const payments = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM payments WHERE customerName = ? ORDER BY date DESC').all(customer.name);\n        \n        const balanceResult = db.prepare(\"SELECT SUM(total) as totalDue FROM invoices WHERE customerAccount = ? AND status IN ('Due', 'Overdue')\").get(customer.accountNumber);\n        const outstandingBalance = balanceResult.totalDue || 0;\n\n        res.json({ \n            customer, \n            history: { invoices, payments },\n            outstandingBalance,\n            lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString(),\n        });\n\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to fetch customer details', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n\napp.post('/api/customers', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        const { name, email, phone, address } = req.body;\n        const joinDate = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];\n        const lastCustomer = db.prepare(\"SELECT accountNumber FROM customers ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1\").get();\n        const nextIdNum = lastCustomer ? parseInt(lastCustomer.accountNumber.split('-')[1]) + 1 : 10001;\n\n        const newCustomer = {\n            id: `CUST-${Date.now()}`,\n            accountNumber: `ACC-${nextIdNum}`,\n            name, email, phone, address, joinDate\n        };\n        db.prepare('INSERT INTO customers (id, accountNumber, name, email, phone, address, joinDate) VALUES (@id, @accountNumber, @name, @email, @phone, @address, @joinDate)').run(newCustomer);\n        res.status(201).json(newCustomer);\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to create customer', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.put('/api/customers/:id', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        const { name, email, phone, address } = req.body;\n        const result = db.prepare('UPDATE customers SET name = ?, email = ?, phone = ?, address = ? WHERE id = ?').run(name, email, phone, address, req.params.id);\n        if (result.changes === 0) {\n            return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Customer not found' });\n        }\n        res.status(200).json({ message: 'Customer updated' });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to update customer', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n// --- METERS ---\napp.get('/api/meters', (req, res) => {\n    const { q, status } = req.query;\n    let query = 'SELECT * FROM meters';\n    const params = [];\n    const conditions = [];\n\n    if (q) {\n        conditions.push('(serialNumber LIKE ? OR customerAccount LIKE ?)');\n        params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    }\n\n    if (status && status !== 'all') {\n        conditions.push('status = ?');\n        params.push(status);\n    }\n\n    if (conditions.length > 0) {\n        query += ' WHERE ' + conditions.join(' AND ');\n    }\n\n    query += ' ORDER BY installationDate DESC';\n\n    const meters = db.prepare(query).all(...params);\n    const readings = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM meter_readings').all();\n    const history = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM meter_status_history').all();\n    res.json({ meters, readings, history });\n});\n\napp.post('/api/meters', (req, res) => {\n    const { serialNumber, customerAccount, installationDate, initialReading } = req.body;\n    const newMeterId = `M-${Date.now()}`;\n    const newReadingId = `R-${Date.now()}`;\n    try {\n        db.transaction(() => {\n            db.prepare('INSERT INTO meters (id, serialNumber, customerAccount, status, installationDate) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)')\n              .run(newMeterId, serialNumber, customerAccount || null, 'Active', installationDate);\n            db.prepare('INSERT INTO meter_readings (id, meterId, reading, date) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)')\n              .run(newReadingId, newMeterId, initialReading, installationDate);\n        })();\n        res.status(201).json({ id: newMeterId });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to add meter', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.put('/api/meters/:id', (req, res) => {\n    const { status, customerAccount } = req.body; // Can be used to update status or assign customer\n    try {\n        const meter = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM meters WHERE id = ?').get(req.params.id);\n        if (!meter) return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Meter not found' });\n\n        if (status && status !== meter.status) {\n            db.prepare('INSERT INTO meter_status_history (meterId, date, fromStatus, toStatus) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)')\n              .run(req.params.id, new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], meter.status, status);\n        }\n\n        const result = db.prepare('UPDATE meters SET status = ?, customerAccount = ? WHERE id = ?')\n                         .run(status || meter.status, customerAccount !== undefined ? customerAccount : meter.customerAccount, req.params.id);\n        \n        if (result.changes > 0) {\n            res.status(200).json({ message: 'Meter updated' });\n        } else {\n            res.status(404).json({ message: 'Meter not found' });\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to update meter', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.post('/api/meters/:id/readings', (req, res) => {\n    const { reading, date } = req.body;\n    try {\n        const newReadingId = `R-${Date.now()}`;\n        db.prepare('INSERT INTO meter_readings (id, meterId, reading, date) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)')\n          .run(newReadingId, req.params.id, reading, date);\n        res.status(201).json({ id: newReadingId });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to add reading', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n\n// --- INVOICES ---\napp.get('/api/invoices', (req, res) => {\n    const { q, sortKey, sortDir, page = 1, limit = 10, status } = req.query;\n    let query = 'SELECT * FROM invoices';\n    const params = [];\n    const conditions = [];\n\n    if (q) {\n        conditions.push('(id LIKE ? OR customerName LIKE ? OR customerAccount LIKE ?)');\n        params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    }\n\n    if (status) {\n        const statusList = status.split(',');\n        conditions.push(`status IN (${statusList.map(() => '?').join(',')})`);\n        params.push(...statusList);\n    }\n    \n    if (conditions.length > 0) {\n        query += ' WHERE ' + conditions.join(' AND ');\n    }\n\n    if (sortKey && sortDir) {\n        query += ` ORDER BY ${sortKey} ${sortDir === 'descending' ? 'DESC' : 'ASC'}`;\n    } else {\n        query += ' ORDER BY issueDate DESC';\n    }\n\n    const totalItemsQuery = query.replace('SELECT *', 'SELECT COUNT(*) as count');\n    const totalItems = db.prepare(totalItemsQuery).get(...params).count;\n\n    if (limit !== 'all') {\n        query += ' LIMIT ? OFFSET ?';\n        params.push(parseInt(limit), (parseInt(page) - 1) * parseInt(limit));\n    }\n    \n    const invoices = db.prepare(query).all(...params);\n    \n    // Attach items to each invoice\n    const stmt = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM invoice_items WHERE invoiceId = ?');\n    const fullInvoices = invoices.map(inv => ({\n        ...inv,\n        items: stmt.all(inv.id)\n    }));\n\n    res.json({ invoices: fullInvoices, totalItems });\n});\n\napp.post('/api/invoices', (req, res) => {\n    const { customerId, issueDate, dueDate, items } = req.body;\n    try {\n        const customer = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM customers WHERE id = ?').get(customerId);\n        if (!customer) return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Customer not found' });\n        \n        const lastInv = db.prepare(\"SELECT id FROM invoices ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1\").get();\n        const nextIdNum = lastInv ? parseInt(lastInv.id.split('-')[2]) + 1 : 1001;\n        const newInvoiceId = `INV-${new Date().getFullYear()}-${nextIdNum}`;\n        \n        const subtotal = items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity * item.unitPrice, 0);\n        \n        db.transaction(() => {\n            db.prepare('INSERT INTO invoices (id, customerName, customerAccount, customerAddress, issueDate, generationDate, dueDate, subtotal, penalties, total, status) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)')\n              .run(newInvoiceId, customer.name, customer.accountNumber, customer.address, issueDate, new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], dueDate, subtotal, 0, subtotal, 'Due');\n            \n            const insertItem = db.prepare('INSERT INTO invoice_items (invoiceId, description, quantity, unitPrice, total) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)');\n            items.forEach(item => insertItem.run(newInvoiceId, item.description, item.quantity, item.unitPrice, item.quantity * item.unitPrice));\n        })();\n\n        res.status(201).json({ id: newInvoiceId });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to create invoice', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.put('/api/invoices/:id', (req, res) => {\n    const { id } = req.params;\n    const { customerId, issueDate, dueDate, items, status } = req.body;\n    \n    try {\n        const invoice = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM invoices WHERE id = ?').get(id);\n        if (!invoice) {\n            return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Invoice not found' });\n        }\n        \n        const customer = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM customers WHERE id = ?').get(customerId);\n        if (!customer) {\n            return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Customer not found' });\n        }\n\n        const subtotal = items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + Number(item.quantity) * Number(item.unitPrice), 0);\n        const total = subtotal + invoice.penalties; \n\n        db.transaction(() => {\n            db.prepare(`\n                UPDATE invoices \n                SET customerName = ?, customerAccount = ?, customerAddress = ?, issueDate = ?, dueDate = ?, subtotal = ?, total = ?, status = ?\n                WHERE id = ?\n            `).run(customer.name, customer.accountNumber, customer.address, issueDate, dueDate, subtotal, total, status, id);\n\n            db.prepare('DELETE FROM invoice_items WHERE invoiceId = ?').run(id);\n\n            const insertItem = db.prepare('INSERT INTO invoice_items (invoiceId, description, quantity, unitPrice, total) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)');\n            for (const item of items) {\n                const itemTotal = Number(item.quantity) * Number(item.unitPrice);\n                insertItem.run(id, item.description, item.quantity, item.unitPrice, itemTotal);\n            }\n        })();\n\n        res.status(200).json({ message: 'Invoice updated successfully' });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to update invoice', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.post('/api/invoices/:id/pay', (req, res) => {\n    const { id } = req.params;\n    const { method = 'Manual', paymentDate = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] } = req.body;\n\n    try {\n        const invoice = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM invoices WHERE id = ?').get(id);\n        if (!invoice) {\n            return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Invoice not found' });\n        }\n        if (invoice.status === 'Paid') {\n            return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Invoice is already paid' });\n        }\n\n        db.transaction(() => {\n            // Update invoice status\n            db.prepare('UPDATE invoices SET status = ? WHERE id = ?').run('Paid', id);\n\n            // Create a payment record\n            const newPaymentId = `RPT-${Date.now()}`;\n            db.prepare('INSERT INTO payments (id, customerName, amount, method, date, invoiceId) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)')\n              .run(newPaymentId, invoice.customerName, invoice.total, method, paymentDate, id);\n        })();\n\n        res.status(200).json({ message: 'Invoice marked as paid and payment recorded.' });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to process payment.', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n\n// --- PAYMENTS ---\napp.get('/api/payments', (req, res) => {\n    const { q, sortKey, sortDir, page = 1, limit = 10 } = req.query;\n    let query = 'SELECT * FROM payments';\n    const params = [];\n    if (q) {\n        query += ' WHERE customerName LIKE ? OR invoiceId LIKE ?';\n        params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    }\n    if (sortKey && sortDir) {\n        query += ` ORDER BY ${sortKey} ${sortDir === 'descending' ? 'DESC' : 'ASC'}`;\n    } else {\n        query += ' ORDER BY date DESC';\n    }\n    const totalItems = db.prepare(query.replace('SELECT *', 'SELECT COUNT(*) as count')).get(...params).count;\n    query += ' LIMIT ? OFFSET ?';\n    params.push(parseInt(limit), (parseInt(page) - 1) * parseInt(limit));\n    const payments = db.prepare(query).all(...params);\n    res.json({ payments, totalItems });\n});\n\napp.post('/api/payments', (req, res) => {\n    const { invoiceId, amount, method, date } = req.body;\n    try {\n        const invoice = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM invoices WHERE id = ?').get(invoiceId);\n        if (!invoice) {\n            return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Invoice not found' });\n        }\n        if (invoice.status === 'Paid') {\n            return res.status(400).json({ message: 'This invoice has already been paid.' });\n        }\n\n        db.transaction(() => {\n            // Update invoice status to 'Paid'\n            db.prepare('UPDATE invoices SET status = ? WHERE id = ?').run('Paid', invoiceId);\n\n            // Create the payment record\n            const newPaymentId = `RPT-${Date.now()}`;\n            db.prepare('INSERT INTO payments (id, customerName, amount, method, date, invoiceId) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)')\n              .run(newPaymentId, invoice.customerName, amount, method, date, invoiceId);\n        })();\n        \n        res.status(201).json({ message: 'Payment recorded successfully.' });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to record payment', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n// --- SETTINGS ---\napp.get('/api/settings/billing', (req, res) => {\n    const settings = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM billing_settings WHERE id = 1').get();\n    res.json(settings);\n});\n\napp.post('/api/settings/billing', (req, res) => {\n    const { frequency, generationDay, readingCutoffDays } = req.body;\n    db.prepare('UPDATE billing_settings SET frequency = ?, generationDay = ?, readingCutoffDays = ? WHERE id = 1')\n      .run(frequency, generationDay, readingCutoffDays);\n    res.status(200).json({ message: 'Settings updated' });\n});\n\n// --- USERS ---\napp.get('/api/users', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        const users = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY name ASC').all();\n        res.json(users);\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to fetch users', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.post('/api/users', (req, res) => {\n    const { name, email, role } = req.body;\n    try {\n        const id = `USR-${Date.now()}`;\n        const lastActive = new Date().toISOString();\n        db.prepare('INSERT INTO users (id, name, email, role, lastActive) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)')\n          .run(id, name, email, role, lastActive);\n        res.status(201).json({ id, name, email, role, lastActive });\n    } catch (err) {\n        if (err.message.includes('UNIQUE constraint failed')) {\n            return res.status(400).json({ message: 'A user with this email already exists.' });\n        }\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to create user', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.delete('/api/users/:id', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        db.prepare('DELETE FROM users WHERE id = ?').run(req.params.id);\n        res.status(200).json({ message: 'User deleted' });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to delete user', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n// --- DATABASE VALIDATION ---\napp.get('/api/db/validate', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        // 1. Run Integrity Check\n        const integrityResult = db.prepare('PRAGMA integrity_check').get();\n        const isHealthy = integrityResult.integrity_check === 'ok';\n        \n        // 2. Gather Statistics\n        const stats = {\n            customers: db.prepare('SELECT count(*) as count FROM customers').get().count,\n            meters: db.prepare('SELECT count(*) as count FROM meters').get().count,\n            readings: db.prepare('SELECT count(*) as count FROM meter_readings').get().count,\n            invoices: db.prepare('SELECT count(*) as count FROM invoices').get().count,\n            payments: db.prepare('SELECT count(*) as count FROM payments').get().count,\n            users: db.prepare('SELECT count(*) as count FROM users').get().count,\n        };\n        \n        // 3. File System Info\n        const dbPath = path.join(__dirname, 'db', 'database.sqlite');\n        let fileSize = 'Unknown';\n        if (fs.existsSync(dbPath)) {\n            const fStats = fs.statSync(dbPath);\n            fileSize = (fStats.size / 1024).toFixed(2) + ' KB';\n        }\n\n        res.json({\n            status: isHealthy ? 'Healthy' : 'Corrupted',\n            integrityMessage: integrityResult.integrity_check,\n            tableCounts: stats,\n            size: fileSize,\n            lastValidated: new Date().toISOString()\n        });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Validation failed', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n\napp.listen(PORT, () => {\n    console.log(`Server is running on http://localhost:${PORT}`);\n});\n"

=> {\n    try {\n        // KPIs\n        const totalBilled = db.prepare(\"SELECT SUM(total) as value FROM invoices WHERE issueDate >= date('now', '-30 days')\").get().value || 0;\n        const totalCollected = db.prepare(\"SELECT SUM(amount) as value FROM payments WHERE date >= date('now', '-30 days')\").get().value || 0;\n        const activeCustomers = db.prepare(\"SELECT count(*) as value FROM customers\").get().value || 0;\n        const overdueAccounts = db.prepare(\"SELECT count(*) as value FROM invoices WHERE status = 'Overdue'\").get().value || 0;\n        \n        // Revenue Chart (last 6 months)\n        const revenueData = db.prepare(`\n            WITH RECURSIVE months(m) AS (\n                SELECT date('now', 'start of month')\n                UNION ALL\n                SELECT date(m, '-1 month') FROM months WHERE m > date('now', 'start of month', '-5 months')\n            )\n            SELECT\n                strftime('%b', m) as month,\n                (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total), 0) FROM invoices WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', issueDate) = strftime('%Y-%m', m)) as billed,\n                (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payments WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', date) = strftime('%Y-%m', m)) as collected\n            FROM months ORDER BY m ASC\n        `).all();\n\n        // Debt Aging\n        const agingData = [\n            { name: '0-30 Days', value: name: '61-90 Days', value: db.prepare(\"SELECT SUM(total) as v FROM invoices WHERE status = 'Overdue' AND dueDate BETWEEN date('now', '-90 days') AND date('now', '-61 days')\").get().v || 0, fill: '#ef4444' },\n            { name: '90+ Days', value: db.prepare(\"SELECT SUM(total) as v FROM invoices WHERE status = 'Overdue' AND dueDate < date('now', '-90 days')\").get().v || 0, fill: '#7f1d1d' },\n        ];\n        \n        // Defaulters\n        const defaulters = db.prepare(\"SELECT id, customerName as name, customerAccount as account, total as amountDue, CAST(julianday('now') - julianday(dueDate) AS INTEGER) as daysOverdue FROM invoices WHERE status = 'Overdue' ORDER BY amountDue DESC LIMIT 5\").all();\n\n        // Recent Payments\n        const recentPayments = ${totalBilled.toLocaleString()}`, change: '+5.2%', changeType: 'increase' },\n                { title: 'Total Collected (Month)', value: `KES ${totalCollected.toLocaleString()}`, change: '+8.1%', changeType: 'increase' },\n                { title: 'Active Customers', value: activeCustomers.toLocaleString(), change: '+25', changeType: 'increase' },\n                { title: 'Overdue Accounts', value: overdueAccounts.toLocaleString(), change: '-3.4%', changeType: 'decrease' },\n            ],\n            revenueData,\n            agingData,\n            defaulters,\n            recentPayments,\n            // NRW data is static for now as it requires more complex inputs\n            nrwData: [\n                { day: 'Mon', percentage: 18.5 }, { day: 'Tue', percentage: 19.2   ]\n        });\n\n    } catch (error) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to fetch dashboard data', error: error.message });\n    }\n});\n\n\n// --- CUSTOMERS ---\napp.get('/api/customers', (req, res) => {\n    const { q, sortKey, sortDir, page = 1, limit = 10 } = req.query;\n    let query = 'SELECT * FROM customers';\n    const params = [];\n\n    if (q) {\n        query += ' WHERE name LIKE ? OR accountNumber LIKE ? OR email LIKE ?';\n        params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    }\n\n    if (sortKey && sortDir) {\n        const allowedKeys = ['name', 'accountNumber', 'email', 'address', 'joinDate'];\n        if (allowedKeys.includes(sortKey)) {\n            query += ` ORDER BY ${sortKey} ${sortDir === 'descending' ? 'DESC' : 'ASC'}`;\n        }\n    } else {\n         query += ` ORDER BY joinDate DESC`;\n    }\n\n    const totalStmt = db.prepare(query.replace('SELECT *', 'SELECT COUNT(*) as count')).all(...params);\n    const totalItems = totalStmt[0].count;\n\n    if (limit !== '1000') {\n        query += ' LIMIT ? OFFSET ?';\n        params.push(parseInt(limit), (parseInt(page) - 1) * parseInt(limit));\n    }\n\n    const customers = db.prepare(query).all(...params);\n    res.json({ customers, totalItems });\n});\n\napp.get('/api/customers/:id', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        const customer = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM customers WHERE id = ?').get(req.params.id);\n        if (!customer) {\n            return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Customer not found' });\n        }\n\n        const invoices = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM invoices WHERE customerAccount = ? ORDER BY issueDate DESC').all(customer.accountNumber);\n        const payments = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM payments WHERE customerName = ? ORDER BY date DESC').all(customer.name);\n        const meters = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM meters WHERE customerAccount = ?').all(customer.accountNumber);\n        \n        const balanceResult = db.prepare(\"SELECT SUM(total) as totalDue FROM invoices WHERE customerAccount = ? AND status IN ('Due', 'Overdue')\").get(customer.accountNumber);\n        const outstandingBalance = balanceResult.totalDue || 0;\n\n        res.json({ \n            customer, \n            history: { invoices, payments },\n            meters,\n            outstandingBalance,\n            lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString(),\n        });\n\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to fetch customer details', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n\napp.post('/api/customers', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        const { name, email, phone, address } = req.body;\n        const joinDate = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];\n        const lastCustomer = db.prepare(\"SELECT accountNumber FROM customers ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1\").get();\n        const nextIdNum = lastCustomer ? parseInt(lastCustomer.accountNumber.split('-')[1]) + 1 : 10001;\n\n        const newCustomer = {\n            id: `CUST-${Date.now()}`,\n            accountNumber: `ACC-${nextIdNum}`,\n            name, email, phone, address, joinDate\n        };\n        db.prepare('INSERT INTO customers (id, accountNumber, name, email, phone, address, joinDate) VALUES (@id, @accountNumber, @name, @email, @phone, @address, @joinDate)').run(newCustomer);\n        res.status(201).json(newCustomer);\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to create customer', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.put('/api/customers/:id', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        const { name, email, phone, address } = req.body;\n        const result = db.prepare('UPDATE customers SET name = ?, email = ?, phone = ?, address = ? WHERE id = ?').run(name, email, phone, address, req.params.id);\n        if (result.changes === 0) {\n            return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Customer not found' });\n        }\n        res.status(200).json({ message: 'Customer updated' });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to update customer', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n// --- METERS ---\napp.get('/api/meters', (req, res) => {\n    const { q, status } = req.query;\n    let query = 'SELECT * FROM meters';\n    const params = [];\n    const conditions = [];\n\n    if (q) {\n        conditions.push('(serialNumber LIKE ? OR customerAccount LIKE ?)');\n        params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    }\n\n    if (status && status !== 'all') {\n        conditions.push('status = ?');\n        params.push(status);\n    }\n\n    if (conditions.length > 0) {\n        query += ' WHERE ' + conditions.join(' AND ');\n    }\n\n    query += ' ORDER BY installationDate DESC';\n\n    const meters = db.prepare(query).all(...params);\n    const readings = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM meter_readings').all();\n    const history = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM meter_status_history').all();\n    res.json({ meters, readings, history });\n});\n\napp.post('/api/meters', (req, res) => {\n    const { serialNumber, customerAccount, installationDate, initialReading } = req.body;\n    const newMeterId = `M-${Date.now()}`;\n    const newReadingId = `R-${Date.now()}`;\n    try {\n        db.transaction(() => {\n            db.prepare('INSERT INTO meters (id, serialNumber, customerAccount, status, installationDate) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)')\n              .run(newMeterId, serialNumber, customerAccount || null, 'Active', installationDate);\n            db.prepare('INSERT INTO meter_readings (id, meterId, reading, date) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)')\n              .run(newReadingId, newMeterId, initialReading, installationDate);\n        })();\n        res.status(201).json({ id: newMeterId });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to add meter', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.put('/api/meters/:id', (req, res) => {\n    const { status, customerAccount } = req.body; WHERE id = ?')\n                         .run(status || meter.status, customerAccount !== undefined ? customerAccount : meter.customerAccount, req.params.id);\n        \n        if (result.changes > 0) {\n            res.status(200).json({ message: 'Meter updated' });\n        } else {\n            res.status(404).json({ message: 'Meter not found' });\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to update meter', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.post('/api/meters/:id/readings', (req, res) => {\n    const { reading, date } = req.body;\n    try {\n        const newReadingId = `R-${Date.now()}`;\n        db.prepare('INSERT INTO meter_readings (id, meterId, reading, date) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)')\n          .run(newReadingId, req.params.id, reading, date);\n        res.status(201).json({ id: newReadingId });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to add reading', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n\n// --- INVOICES ---\napp.get('/api/invoices', (req, res) => {\n    const { q, sortKey, sortDir, page = 1, limit = 10, status } = req.query;\n    let query = 'SELECT * FROM invoices';\n    const params = [];\n    const conditions = [];\n\n    if (q) {\n        conditions.push('(id LIKE ? OR customerName LIKE ? OR customerAccount LIKE ?)');\n        params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    }\n\n    if (status) {\n        const statusList = status.split(',');\n        conditions.push(`status IN (${statusList.map(() => '?').join(',')})`);\n        params.push(...statusList);\n    }\n    \n    if (conditions.length > 0) {\n        query += ' WHERE ' + conditions.join(' AND ');\n    }\n\n    if (sortKey && sortDir) {\n        query += ` ORDER BY ${sortKey} ${sortDir === 'descending' ? OFFSET ?';\n        params.push(parseInt(limit), (parseInt(page) - 1) * parseInt(limit));\n    }\n    \n    const invoices = db.prepare(query).all(...params);\n    \n    // Attach items to each Run Integrity Check\n        const integrityResult = db.prepare('PRAGMA integrity_check').get();\n        const isHealthy = integrityResult.integrity_check === 'ok';\n        \n        // 2. => {\n    try {\n        // KPIs\n        const totalBilled = db.prepare(\"SELECT SUM(total) as value FROM invoices WHERE issueDate >= date('now', '-30 days')\").get().value || 0;\n        const totalCollected = db.prepare(\"SELECT SUM(amount) as value FROM payments WHERE date >= date('now', '-30 days')\").get().value || 0;\n        const activeCustomers = db.prepare(\"SELECT count(*) as value FROM customers\").get().value || 0;\n        const overdueAccounts = db.prepare(\"SELECT count(*) as value FROM invoices WHERE status = 'Overdue'\").get().value || 0;\n        \n        // Revenue Chart (last 6 months)\n        const revenueData = db.prepare(`\n            WITH RECURSIVE months(m) AS (\n                SELECT date('now', 'start of month')\n                UNION ALL\n                SELECT date(m, '-1 month') FROM months WHERE m > date('now', 'start of month', '-5 months')\n            )\n            SELECT\n                strftime('%b', m) as month,\n                (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total), 0) FROM invoices WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', issueDate) = strftime('%Y-%m', m)) as billed,\n                (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payments WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', date) = strftime('%Y-%m', m)) as collected\n            FROM months ORDER BY m ASC\n        `).all();\n\n        // Debt Aging\n        const agingData = [\n            { name: '0-30 Days', value: db.prepare(\"SELECT SUM(total) as v FROM invoices WHERE status = 'Due' AND dueDate >= date('now', '-30 days')\").get().v || 0, fill: '#3b82f6' },\n            { name: '31-60 Days', value: db.prepare(\"SELECT SUM(total) as v FROM invoices WHERE status = 'Overdue' AND dueDate BETWEEN date('now', '-60 days') AND date('now', '-31 days')\").get().v || 0, fill: '#f59e0b' },\n            { name: '61-90 Days', value: db.prepare(\"SELECT SUM(total) as v FROM invoices WHERE status = 'Overdue' AND dueDate BETWEEN date('now', '-90 days') AND date('now', '-61 days')\").get().v || 0, fill: '#ef4444' },\n            { name: '90+ Days', value: db.prepare(\"SELECT SUM(total) as v FROM invoices WHERE status = 'Overdue' AND dueDate < date('now', '-90 days')\").get().v || 0, fill: '#7f1d1d' },\n        ];\n        \n        // Defaulters\n        const defaulters = db.prepare(\"SELECT id, customerName as name, customerAccount as account, total as amountDue, CAST(julianday('now') - julianday(dueDate) AS INTEGER) as daysOverdue FROM invoices WHERE status = 'Overdue' ORDER BY amountDue DESC LIMIT 5\").all();\n\n        // Recent Payments\n        const recentPayments = changeType: 'increase' },\n                { title: 'Active Customers', value: activeCustomers.toLocaleString(), change: '+25', changeType: 'increase' },\n                { title: 'Overdue Accounts', value: overdueAccounts.toLocaleString(), change: '-3.4%', changeType: 'decrease' },\n            ],\n            revenueData,\n            agingData,\n            defaulters,\n ---\napp.get('/api/customers', (req, res) => {\n    const { q, sortKey, sortDir, page = 1, limit = 10 } = req.query;\n    let query = 'SELECT * FROM customers';\n    const params = [];\n\n    if (q) {\n        query += ' WHERE name LIKE ? OR accountNumber LIKE ? OR email LIKE ?';\n        params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    }\n\n    if (sortKey && sortDir) {\n        const allowedKeys = ['name', 'accountNumber', 'email', 'address', 'joinDate'];\n        if (allowedKeys.includes(sortKey)) {\n            query += ` ORDER BY ${sortKey} ${sortDir === 'descending' ? 'DESC' : 'ASC'}`;\n        }\n    } else {\n         query += ` ORDER BY joinDate DESC`;\n    }\n\n    const totalStmt = db.prepare(query.replace('SELECT *', 'SELECT COUNT(*) as count')).all(...params);\n    const totalItems = totalStmt[0].count;\n\n    if (limit !== '1000') {\n        query += ' LIMIT ? OFFSET ?';\n        params.push(parseInt(limit), (parseInt(page) - 1) * parseInt(limit));\n    }\n\n    const customers = db.prepare(query).all(...params);\n    res.json({ customers, totalItems });\n});\n\napp.get('/api/customers/:id', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        const customer = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM customers WHERE id = ?').get(req.params.id);\n        if (!customer) {\n            return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Customer not found' });\n        }\n\n        const invoices = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM invoices WHERE customerAccount = ? ORDER BY issueDate DESC').all(customer.accountNumber);\n        const payments = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM payments WHERE customerName = ? ORDER BY date DESC').all(customer.name);\n        const meters = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM meters WHERE customerAccount = ?').all(customer.accountNumber);\n        \n        const balanceResult = db.prepare(\"SELECT SUM(total) as totalDue FROM invoices WHERE customerAccount = ? AND status IN ('Due', 'Overdue')\").get(customer.accountNumber);\n        const outstandingBalance = balanceResult.totalDue || 0;\n\n        res.json({ \n            customer, \n            history: { invoices, payments },\n            meters,\n            outstandingBalance,\n            lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString(),\n        });\n\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to fetch customer details', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n\napp.post('/api/customers', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        const { name, email, phone, address } = req.body;\n        const joinDate = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];\n        const lastCustomer = db.prepare(\"SELECT accountNumber FROM customers ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1\").get();\n        const nextIdNum = lastCustomer ? parseInt(lastCustomer.accountNumber.split('-')[1]) + 1 : 10001;\n\n        const newCustomer = {\n            id: `CUST-${Date.now()}`,\n            accountNumber: `ACC-${nextIdNum}`,\n            name, email, phone, address, joinDate\n        };\n        db.prepare('INSERT INTO customers (id, accountNumber, name, email, phone, address, joinDate) VALUES (@id, @accountNumber, @name, @email, @phone, @address, @joinDate)').run(newCustomer);\n        res.status(201).json(newCustomer);\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to create customer', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.put('/api/customers/:id', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        const { name, email, phone, address } = req.body;\n        const result = db.prepare('UPDATE customers SET name = ?, email = ?, phone = ?, address = ? WHERE id = ?').run(name, email, phone, address, req.params.id);\n        if (result.changes === 0) {\n            return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Customer not found' });\n        }\n        res.status(200).json({ message: 'Customer updated' });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to update customer', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n// --- METERS ---\napp.get('/api/meters', (req, res) => {\n    const { q, status } = req.query;\n    let query = 'SELECT * FROM meters';\n    const params = [];\n    const conditions = [];\n\n    if (q) {\n        conditions.push('(serialNumber LIKE ? OR customerAccount LIKE ?)');\n        params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    }\n\n    if (status && status !== 'all') {\n        conditions.push('status = ?');\n        params.push(status);\n    }\n\n    if (conditions.length > 0) {\n        query += ' WHERE ' + conditions.join(' AND ');\n    }\n\n    query += ' ORDER BY installationDate DESC';\n\n    const meters = db.prepare(query).all(...params);\n    const readings = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM meter_readings').all();\n    const history = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM meter_status_history').all();\n    res.json({ meters, readings, history });\n});\n\napp.post('/api/meters', (req, res) => {\n    const { serialNumber, customerAccount, installationDate, initialReading } = req.body;\n    const newMeterId = `M-${Date.now()}`;\n    const newReadingId = `R-${Date.now()}`;\n    try {\n        db.transaction(() => {\n            db.prepare('INSERT INTO meters (id, serialNumber, customerAccount, status, installationDate) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)')\n              .run(newMeterId, serialNumber, customerAccount || null, 'Active', installationDate);\n            db.prepare('INSERT INTO meter_readings (id, meterId, reading, date) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)')\n              .run(newReadingId, newMeterId, initialReading, installationDate);\n        })();\n        res.status(201).json({ id: newMeterId });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to add meter', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.put('/api/meters/:id', (req, res) => {\n    const { status, customerAccount } = req.body; // Can be used to update status or assign customer\n    try {\n        const meter = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM meters WHERE id = ?').get(req.params.id);\n        if (!meter) return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Meter not found' });\n\n        if (status && status !== meter.status) {\n            db.prepare('INSERT INTO meter_status_history (meterId, date, fromStatus, toStatus) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)')\n              .run(req.params.id, new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], meter.status, status);\n        }\n\n        const result = db.prepare('UPDATE meters SET status = ?, customerAccount = ? WHERE id = ?')\n                         .run(status || meter.status, customerAccount !== undefined ? customerAccount : meter.customerAccount, req.params.id);\n        \n        if (result.changes > 0) {\n            res.status(200).json({ message: 'Meter updated' });\n        } else {\n            res.status(404).json({ message: 'Meter not found' });\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to update meter', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.post('/api/meters/:id/readings', (req, res) => {\n    const { reading, date } = req.body;\n    try {\n        const newReadingId = `R-${Date.now()}`;\n        db.prepare('INSERT INTO meter_readings (id, meterId, reading, date) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)')\n          .run(newReadingId, req.params.id, reading, date);\n        res.status(201).json({ id: newReadingId });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to add reading', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n\n// --- INVOICES ---\napp.get('/api/invoices', (req, res) => {\n    const { q, sortKey, sortDir, page = 1, limit = 10, status } = req.query;\n    let query = 'SELECT * FROM invoices';\n    const params = [];\n    const conditions = [];\n\n    if (q) {\n        conditions.push('(id LIKE ? OR customerName LIKE ? OR customerAccount LIKE ?)');\n        params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    }\n\n    if (status) {\n        const statusList = status.split(',');\n        conditions.push(`status IN (${statusList.map(() => '?').join(',')})`);\n        params.push(...statusList);\n    }\n    \n    if (conditions.length > 0) {\n        query += ' WHERE ' + conditions.join(' AND ');\n    }\n\n    if (sortKey && sortDir) {\n        query += ` ORDER BY ${sortKey} ${sortDir === 'descending' ? 'DESC' : 'ASC'}`;\n    } else {\n        query += ' ORDER BY issueDate DESC';\n    }\n\n    const totalItemsQuery = query.replace('SELECT *', 'SELECT COUNT(*) as count');\n    const totalItems = db.prepare(totalItemsQuery).get(...params).count;\n\n    if (limit !== 'all') {\n        query += ' LIMIT ? OFFSET ?';\n        params.push(parseInt(limit), (parseInt(page) - 1) * parseInt(limit));\n    }\n    \n    const invoices = db.prepare(query).all(...params);\n    \n    // Attach items to each invoice\n    const stmt = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM invoice_items WHERE invoiceId = ?');\n    const fullInvoices = invoices.map(inv => ({\n        ...inv,\n        items: stmt.all(inv.id)\n    }));\n\n    res.json({ invoices: fullInvoices, totalItems });\n});\n\napp.post('/api/invoices', (req, res) => {\n    const { customerId, issueDate, dueDate, items } = req.body;\n    try {\n        const customer = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM customers WHERE id = ?').get(customerId);\n        if (!customer) return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Customer not found' });\n        \n        const lastInv = db.prepare(\"SELECT id FROM invoices ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1\").get();\n        const nextIdNum = lastInv ? parseInt(lastInv.id.split('-')[2]) + 1 : 1001;\n        const newInvoiceId = `INV-${new Date().getFullYear()}-${nextIdNum}`;\n        \n        const subtotal = items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity * item.unitPrice, 0);\n        \n        db.transaction(() => {\n            db.prepare('INSERT INTO invoices (id, customerName, customerAccount, customerAddress, issueDate, generationDate, dueDate, subtotal, penalties, total, status) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)')\n              .run(newInvoiceId, customer.name, customer.accountNumber, customer.address, issueDate, new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], dueDate, subtotal, 0, subtotal, 'Due');\n {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to create invoice', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n// Bulk billing preview\napp.get('/api/invoices/bulk/preview', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        // Find customers with meters and at least one reading\n        const billable = db.prepare(`\n            SELECT \n                c.id as customerId, c.name, c.accountNumber, c.address,\n                m.id as meterId, m.serialNumber,\n                (SELECT reading FROM meter_readings WHERE meterId = m.id ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) as currentReading,\n                (SELECT date FROM meter_readings WHERE meterId = m.id ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) as readingDate,\n                (SELECT MAX(issueDate) FROM invoices WHERE customerAccount = c.accountNumber) as lastInvoiceDate\n            FROM customers c\n            JOIN meters m ON m.customerAccount = c.accountNumber\n            WHERE currentReading IS NOT NULL\n        `).all();\n\n        // Calculate expected consumption based on last invoice or initial reading\n        const preview = billable.map(item => {\n            let prevReading = 0;\n            if (item.lastInvoiceDate) {\n                // Get reading closest to last invoice\n                const r = db.prepare(\"SELECT reading FROM meter_readings WHERE meterId = ? AND date <= ? ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1\")\n                           .get(item.meterId, item.lastInvoiceDate);\n                prevReading = r ? r.reading : 0;\n            } else {\n                // Get first reading\n                const r = db.prepare(\"SELECT reading FROM meter_readings WHERE meterId = ? ORDER BY date ASC LIMIT 1\")\n                           .get(item.meterId);\n                prevReading = r ? r.reading : 0;\n            }\n\n            const consumption = Math.max(0, item.currentReading - prevReading);\n            return {\n                ...item,\n                previousReading: prevReading,\n                consumption,\n                total: consumption * 110 + 200 + 150 // Standard rate: 110/unit + standing + sewer\n            };\n        });\n\n        res.json(preview);\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to generate bulk preview', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.post('/api/invoices/bulk/generate', (req, res) => {\n    const { batch, issueDate, dueDate, unitPrice = 110 } = req.body;\n    try {\n        const results = [];\n        db.transaction(() => {\n            for (const item of batch) {\n                const lastInv = db.prepare(\"SELECT id FROM invoices ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1\").get();\n                const nextIdNum = lastInv ? parseInt(lastInv.id.split('-')[2]) + 1 : 1001;\n                const newInvoiceId = `INV-${new Date().getFullYear()}-${nextIdNum}`;\n                \n                const standingCharge = 200;\n                const sewerCharge = 150;\n                const waterTotal = item.consumption * unitPrice;\n                const total = waterTotal + standingCharge + sewerCharge;\n\n                db.prepare('INSERT INTO invoices (id, customerName, customerAccount, customerAddress, issueDate, generationDate, dueDate, subtotal, penalties, total, status) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)')\n                  .run(newInvoiceId, item.name, item.accountNumber, item.address, issueDate, new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], dueDate, total, 0, total, 'Due');\n                \n                const insertItem = db.prepare('INSERT INTO invoice_items (invoiceId, description, quantity, unitPrice, total) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)');\n                insertItem.run(newInvoiceId, `Water Usage (${item.consumption} m³)`, item.consumption, unitPrice, waterTotal);\n                insertItem.run(newInvoiceId, 'Standing Charge', 1, standingCharge, standingCharge);\n                insertItem.run(newInvoiceId, 'Sewerage Charge', 1, sewerCharge, sewerCharge);\n                \n                results.push(newInvoiceId);\n            }\n        })();\n        res.status(201).json({ count: results.length, ids: results });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Bulk generation failed', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.put('/api/invoices/:id', (req, res) => {\n    const { id } = req.params;\n    const { customerId, issueDate, dueDate, items, status } = req.body;\n    \n    try {\n        const invoice = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM invoices WHERE id = ?').get(id);\n        if (!invoice) {\n            return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Invoice not found' });\n        }\n        \n        const customer = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM customers WHERE id = ?').get(customerId);\n        if (!customer) {\n            return total = subtotal + invoice.penalties; \n\n        db.transaction(() => {\n            db.prepare(`\n                UPDATE invoices \n                SET customerName = ?, customerAccount = ?, customerAddress = ?, issueDate = ?, dueDate = ?, subtotal = ?, total = ?, status = ?\n                WHERE id = ?\n            `).run(customer.name, customer.accountNumber, customer.address, issueDate, dueDate, subtotal, total, status, id);\n\n            db.prepare('DELETE FROM invoice_items WHERE invoiceId = ?').run(id);\n\n            const insertItem = db.prepare('INSERT INTO invoice_items (invoiceId, description, quantity, unitPrice, total) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)');\n            for (const item of items) {\n                const itemTotal = Number(item.quantity) * Number(item.unitPrice);\n                insertItem.run(id, item.description, item.quantity, item.unitPrice, itemTotal);\n            }\n        })();\n\n        res.status(200).json({ message: 'Invoice updated successfully' });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to update invoice', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.post('/api/invoices/:id/pay', db.prepare('SELECT * FROM invoices WHERE id = ?').get(id);\n        if (!invoice) {\n            return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Invoice not found' });\n        }\n        if (invoice.status db.prepare('UPDATE invoices SET status = ? WHERE id = ?').run('Paid', id);\n\n            // Create a payment record\n            const newPaymentId = `RPT-${Date.now()}`;\n            db.prepare('INSERT INTO payments (id, customerName, amount, method, date, invoiceId) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)')\n              .run(newPaymentId, invoice.customerName, invoice.total, method, paymentDate, id);\n        })();\n\n        res.status(200).json({ message: 'Invoice marked as paid and payment recorded.' });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to process payment.', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n\n// --- PAYMENTS ---\napp.get('/api/payments', (req, res) => {\n    const { q, sortKey, sortDir, page = 1, limit = 10 } = req.query;\n    let query = 'SELECT * FROM payments';\n    const params = [];\n    if (q) {\n        query += ' WHERE customerName LIKE ? OR invoiceId LIKE ?';\n        params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    }\n    if (sortKey && sortDir) {\n        query += ` ORDER BY ${sortKey} ${sortDir === 'descending' ? 'DESC' : 'ASC'}`;\n    } else {\n        query += ' ORDER BY date DESC';\n    }\n    const totalItems = db.prepare(query.replace('SELECT *', 'SELECT COUNT(*) as count')).get(...params).count;\n    query += ' LIMIT ? OFFSET ?';\n    params.push(parseInt(limit), (parseInt(page) - 1) * parseInt(limit));\n    const payments = db.prepare(query).all(...params);\n    res.json({ payments, totalItems });\n});\n\napp.post('/api/payments', (req, res) => {\n    const { invoiceId, amount, method, date } = req.body;\n    try {\n        const invoice = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM invoices WHERE id = ?').get(invoiceId);\n        if (!invoice) {\n            return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Invoice not found' });\n        }\n        if (invoice.status === 'Paid') {\n            return res.status(400).json({ message: 'This invoice has already been paid.' });\n        }\n\n        db.transaction(() => {\n            // Update invoice status to 'Paid'\n            db.prepare('UPDATE invoices SET status = ? OR accountNumber LIKE ? {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to create invoice', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n// Bulk billing preview\napp.get('/api/invoices/bulk/preview', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        // Find customers with meters and at least one reading\n        const billable = db.prepare(`\n            SELECT \n                c.id as customerId, c.name, c.accountNumber, c.address,\n                m.id as meterId, m.serialNumber,\n                (SELECT reading FROM meter_readings WHERE meterId = m.id ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) as currentReading,\n                (SELECT date FROM meter_readings WHERE meterId = m.id ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) as readingDate,\n                (SELECT MAX(issueDate) FROM invoices WHERE customerAccount = c.accountNumber) as lastInvoiceDate\n            FROM customers c\n            JOIN meters m ON m.customerAccount = c.accountNumber\n            WHERE currentReading IS NOT NULL\n        `).all();\n\n        // Calculate expected consumption based on last invoice or initial reading\n        const preview = billable.map(item => {\n            let prevReading = 0;\n            if (item.lastInvoiceDate) {\n                // Get reading closest to last invoice\n                const r = db.prepare(\"SELECT reading FROM meter_readings WHERE meterId = ? AND date <= ? ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1\")\n                           .get(item.meterId, item.lastInvoiceDate);\n                prevReading = r ? r.reading : 0;\n            } else {\n                // Get first reading\n                const r = db.prepare(\"SELECT reading FROM meter_readings WHERE meterId = ? ORDER BY date ASC LIMIT 1\")\n                           .get(item.meterId);\n                prevReading = r ? r.reading : 0;\n            }\n\n            const consumption = Math.max(0, item.currentReading - prevReading);\n            return {\n                ...item,\n                previousReading: prevReading,\n                consumption,\n                total: consumption * 110 + 200 + 150 // Standard rate: 110/unit + standing + sewer\n            };\n        });\n\n        res.json(preview);\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to generate bulk preview', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.post('/api/invoices/bulk/generate', (req, res) => {\n    const { batch, issueDate, dueDate, unitPrice = 110 } = req.body;\n    try {\n        const results = [];\n        db.transaction(() => {\n            for (const item of batch) {\n                const lastInv = db.prepare(\"SELECT id FROM invoices ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1\").get();\n                const nextIdNum = lastInv ? parseInt(lastInv.id.split('-')[2]) + 1 : 1001;\n                const newInvoiceId = `INV-${new Date().getFullYear()}-${nextIdNum}`;\n                \n                const standingCharge = 200;\n                const sewerCharge = 150;\n                const waterTotal = item.consumption * unitPrice;\n                const total = waterTotal + standingCharge + sewerCharge;\n\n                db.prepare('INSERT INTO invoices (id, customerName, customerAccount, customerAddress, issueDate, generationDate, dueDate, subtotal, penalties, total, status) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)')\n                  .run(newInvoiceId, item.name, item.accountNumber, item.address, issueDate, new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], dueDate, total, 0, total, 'Due');\n                \n                const insertItem = db.prepare('INSERT INTO invoice_items (invoiceId, description, quantity, unitPrice, total) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)');\n                insertItem.run(newInvoiceId, `Water Usage (${item.consumption} m³)`, item.consumption, unitPrice, waterTotal);\n                insertItem.run(newInvoiceId, 'Standing Charge', 1, standingCharge, standingCharge);\n                insertItem.run(newInvoiceId, 'Sewerage Charge', 1, sewerCharge, sewerCharge);\n                \n                results.push(newInvoiceId);\n            }\n        })();\n        res.status(201).json({ count: results.length, ids: results });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ total = subtotal + invoice.penalties; \n\n        db.transaction(() => {\n            db.prepare(`\n                UPDATE invoices \n                SET customerName = ?, customerAccount = ?, customerAddress = ?, issueDate = ?, dueDate = ?, subtotal = ?, total = ?, status = ?\n                WHERE id = ?\n            `).run(customer.name, customer.accountNumber, customer.address, issueDate, dueDate, subtotal, total, status, id);\n\n            db.prepare('DELETE FROM invoice_items WHERE invoiceId = ?').run(id);\n\n            const insertItem = db.prepare('INSERT INTO invoice_items (invoiceId, description, quantity, unitPrice, total) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)');\n            for (const item of items) {\n                const itemTotal = Number(item.quantity) * Number(item.unitPrice);\n                insertItem.run(id, item.description, item.quantity, item.unitPrice, itemTotal);\n            }\n        })();\n\n        res.status(200).json({ message: 'Invoice updated successfully' });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to update invoice', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.post('/api/invoices/:id/pay', (req, res) => {\n    const { id } = req.params;\n    const { method = 'Manual', paymentDate = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] } = req.body;\n\n    try {\n        const invoice = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM invoices WHERE id = ?').get(id);\n        if (!invoice) {\n            return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Invoice not found' });\n        }\n        if (invoice.status === 'Paid') {\n            return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Invoice is already paid' });\n        }\n\n        db.transaction(() => {\n            // Update invoice status\n            db.prepare('UPDATE invoices SET status = ? WHERE id = ?').run('Paid', id);\n\n            // Create a payment record\n            const newPaymentId = `RPT-${Date.now()}`;\n            db.prepare('INSERT INTO payments (id, customerName, amount, method, date, invoiceId) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)')\n              .run(newPaymentId, invoice.customerName, invoice.total, method, paymentDate, id);\n        })();\n\n        res.status(200).json({ message: 'Invoice marked as paid and payment recorded.' });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to process payment.', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n\n// --- PAYMENTS ---\napp.get('/api/payments', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        const { q, sortKey, sortDir, page = 1, limit = 10 } = req.query;\n        let query = 'SELECT * FROM payments';\n        const params = [];\n        if (q) {\n            query += ' WHERE customerName LIKE ? OR invoiceId LIKE ?';\n            params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n        }\n        if (sortKey && sortDir) {\n            query += ` ORDER BY ${sortKey} ${sortDir === 'descending' ? 'DESC' : 'ASC'}`;\n        } else {\n            query += ' ORDER BY date DESC';\n        }\n        const totalItemsQuery = query.replace('SELECT *', 'SELECT COUNT(*) as count');\n        const totalItems = db.prepare(totalItemsQuery).get(...params).count;\n\n        if (limit !== 'all') {\n            const parsedLimit = Math.max(1, parseInt(limit) || 10);\n            const parsedPage = Math.max(1, parseInt(page) || 1);\n            query += ' LIMIT ? OFFSET ?';\n            params.push(parsedLimit, (parsedPage - 1) * parsedLimit);\n        }\n        const payments = db.prepare(query).all(...params);\n        res.json({ payments, totalItems });\n    } catch (error) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to fetch payments', error: error.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.post('/api/payments', (req, res) => {\n    const { invoiceId, amount, method, date } = req.body;\n    try {\n        const invoice = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM invoices WHERE id = ?').get(invoiceId);\n        if (!invoice) {\n            return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Invoice not found' });\n        }\n        if (invoice.status === 'Paid') {\n            return res.status(400).json({ message: 'This invoice has already been paid.' });\n        }\n\n        db.transaction(() => {\n            // Update invoice status to 'Paid'\n            db.prepare('UPDATE invoices SET status = ? WHERE id = ?').run('Paid', invoiceId);\n\n            // Create the payment record\n            const newPaymentId = `RPT-${Date.now()}`;\n            db.prepare('INSERT INTO payments (id, customerName, amount, method, date, invoiceId) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)')\n              .run(newPaymentId, invoice.customerName, amount, method, date, invoiceId);\n        })();\n        \n        res.status(201).json({ message: 'Payment recorded successfully.' });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to record payment', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n// --- SETTINGS ---\napp.get('/api/settings/billing', (req, res) => {\n    const settings = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM billing_settings WHERE id = 1').get();\n    res.json(settings);\n});\n\napp.post('/api/settings/billing', (req, res) => {\n    const { frequency, generationDay, readingCutoffDays } = req.body;\n    db.prepare('UPDATE billing_settings SET frequency = ?, generationDay = ?, readingCutoffDays = ? WHERE id = 1')\n      .run(frequency, generationDay, readingCutoffDays);\n    res.status(200).json({ message: 'Settings updated' });\n});\n\n// --- USERS ---\napp.get('/api/users', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        const users = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY name ASC').all();\n        res.json(users);\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to fetch users', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.post('/api/users', (req, res) => {\n    const { name, email, role } = req.body;\n    try {\n        const id = `USR-${Date.now()}`;\n        const lastActive = new Date().toISOString();\n        db.prepare('INSERT INTO users (id, name, email, role, lastActive) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)')\n          .run(id, name, email, role, lastActive);\n        res.status(201).json({ id, name, email, role, lastActive });\n    } catch (err) {\n        if (err.message.includes('UNIQUE constraint failed')) {\n            return res.status(400).json({ message: 'A user with this email already exists.' });\n        }\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to create user', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\napp.delete('/api/users/:id', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        db.prepare('DELETE FROM users WHERE id = ?').run(req.params.id);\n        res.status(200).json({ message: 'User deleted' });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to delete user', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n// --- DATABASE VALIDATION ---\napp.get('/api/db/validate', (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        // 1. Run Integrity Check\n        const integrityResult = db.prepare('PRAGMA integrity_check').get();\n        const isHealthy = integrityResult.integrity_check === 'ok';\n        \n        // 2. Gather Statistics\n        const stats = {\n            customers: db.prepare('SELECT count(*) as count FROM customers').get().count,\n            meters: db.prepare('SELECT count(*) as count FROM meters').get().count,\n            readings: db.prepare('SELECT count(*) as count FROM meter_readings').get().count,\n            invoices: db.prepare('SELECT count(*) as count FROM invoices').get().count,\n            payments: db.prepare('SELECT count(*) as count FROM payments').get().count,\n            users: db.prepare('SELECT count(*) as count FROM users').get().count,\n        };\n        \n        // 3. File System Info\n        const dbPath = path.join(__dirname, 'db', 'database.sqlite');\n        let fileSize = 'Unknown';\n        if (fs.existsSync(dbPath)) {\n            const fStats = fs.statSync(dbPath);\n            fileSize = (fStats.size / 1024).toFixed(2) + ' KB';\n        }\n\n        res.json({\n            status: isHealthy ? 'Healthy' : 'Corrupted',\n            integrityMessage: integrityResult.integrity_check,\n            tableCounts: stats,\n            size: fileSize,\n            lastValidated: new Date().toISOString()\n        });\n    } catch (err) {\n        res.status(500).json({ message: 'Validation failed', error: err.message });\n    }\n});\n\n\napp.listen(PORT, () => {\n    console.log(`Server is running on http://localhost:${PORT}`);\n});\n"

Environment Configuration\nCreate a `.env` file in the **root** directory and add your Gemini API Key for the Live Assistant and AI Insights features:\n```env\nAPI_KEY=your_google_gemini_api_key_here\n```\n\n#### 4. Running the Application\nYou need **two** terminal windows open:\n\n*   **Terminal 1 (Backend)**:\n    ```bash\n    cd server\n    npm start\n    ```\n    *The server will start on `http://localhost:3001`. Local Testing Checklist\n- [ ] **Dashboard**: Verify KPIs (Total Billed, Collected) are loading from the database.\n- [ ] **Customers**: Search for \"Asha\", click her row to view the profile and AI insights.\n- [ ] **Billing**: Go to **Invoices**, click **Bulk Generate**. For large-scale cloud hosting, follow these steps.\n\n#### 1. Frontend (Static Hosting)\nThe frontend can be hosted on **Vercel, Netlify, or AWS S3**.\n1.  Run `npm run build`.\n2.  Upload the `dist` folder to your provider.\n3.  **Important**: Ensure your `API_BASE_URL` in `lib/api.ts` points to your production backend URL instead of `/api` (or configure a proxy).\n\n#### 2. Backend (Server Hosting)\nThe backend requires a persistent environment to keep the SQLite file. Use **Render, Railway, or DigitalOcean Droplets**.\n\n**Deployment to Railway/Render:**\n1.  Connect your GitHub repo.\n2.  Set the Root Directory to `server`.\n3.  Install Command: `npm install`.\n4.  Start Command: `node index.js`.\n5.  **Environment Variables**: Add `API_KEY` to the service settings.\n6.  **Persistent Disk**: Attach a \"Volume\" (e.g., `/app/db`) and update `server/db.js` to point to that persistent path. This ensures your data isn't wiped when the server restarts.\n\n#### 3. Recommended Production Architecture\n*   **Database**: For \"Real\" production, replace `better-sqlite3` with `PostgreSQL` (hosted on Supabase or AWS RDS) to allow for horizontal scaling.\n*   **Security**: Add an `Auth0` or `Firebase Auth` layer to the Express middleware to protect the `/api` routes.\n*   **SSL**: Ensure the backend is served over `HTTPS` for the Gemini Live API (microphone access requires a secure context).\n\n---\n\n### Part 3: Troubleshooting Invalid Responses\n\nIf you see the error **\"Received an invalid response from the server\"**:\n\n1.  **Check Terminal**: Look at the Backend terminal for SQLite errors (e.g., \"Table not found\").\n2.  **CORS**: Ensure `app.use(cors())` is enabled in `server/index.js`.\n3.  **Proxy**: In your `vite.config.ts`, ensure you have a proxy set up to redirect `/api` calls to `http://localhost:3001`.\n4.  **Database File**: If the data seems corrupted, delete `server/db/database.sqlite` and restart the backend to re-seed.",

lib/api.ts:export const fetchFromApi = async (endpoint: string, options?: RequestInit) => {
lib/api.ts:    try {
lib/api.ts:        const userStr = localStorage.getItem('user');
lib/api.ts:        const user = userStr ? JSON.parse(userStr) : null;
lib/api.ts:        
lib/api.ts:        const url = endpoint.startsWith('/') 
lib/api.ts:            ? `${API_BASE_URL}${endpoint}`
lib/api.ts:            : `${API_BASE_URL}/${endpoint}`;
lib/api.ts:            
lib/api.ts:        const cacheBuster = url.includes('?') ? `&_t=${Date.now()}` : `?_t=${Date.now()}`;
lib/api.ts:        
lib/api.ts:            ...options,
lib/api.ts:            headers: {
lib/api.ts:                'Accept': 'application/json',
lib/api.ts:                ...(user ? { 'X-User-Role': user.role, 'X-User-Id': user.id.toString() } : {}),
lib/api.ts:                ...options?.headers,
lib/api.ts:            },
lib/api.ts:        });
lib/api.ts:        
lib/api.ts:        const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type");
lib/api.ts:        const isJson = contentType && contentType.includes("application/json");
lib/api.ts:        
lib/api.ts:        console.log(`[API] ${endpoint} response:`, text.substring(0, 100));
lib/api.ts:        
lib/api.ts:        if (!response.ok) {
lib/api.ts:            let errorMessage = `API Error (${response.status} on ${endpoint})`;
lib/api.ts:            try {
lib/api.ts:                if (isJson) {
lib/api.ts:                    const errorData = JSON.parse(text);
lib/api.ts:                    errorMessage = errorData.message || errorData.error || errorMessage;
lib/api.ts:                } else {
lib/api.ts:                    errorMessage = text ? `Server Error: ${text.substring(0, 100)}...` : errorMessage;
lib/api.ts:                }
lib/api.ts:            } catch (e) {
lib/api.ts:                // Ignore parse error for error response
lib/api.ts:            }
lib/api.ts:            throw new Error(errorMessage);
lib/api.ts:        }
lib/api.ts:
lib/api.ts:        // Handle successful but empty responses
lib/api.ts:        if (response.status === 204) {
lib/api.ts:            return null;
lib/api.ts:        }
lib/api.ts:
lib/api.ts:        if (!isJson) {
lib/api.ts:            if (!text) return null;
lib/api.ts:            console.error(`Expected JSON from ${endpoint} but got:`, text.substring(0, 100));
lib/api.ts:            throw new Error(`Server returned non-JSON response for ${endpoint}`);
lib/api.ts:        }
lib/api.ts:        
lib/api.ts:        return JSON.parse(text);
lib/api.ts:

README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:# WABA Notification System
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:This document outlines the notification system implemented in the WABA (Water Billing Application) system.
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:## Overview
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:The notification system allows administrators to configure alerts based on consumption thresholds and unusual activity. It monitors meter readings in real-time and generates alerts when specific conditions are met.
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:## Features
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:1. **High Consumption Alerts**: Triggers a notification when a single meter reading exceeds a user-defined threshold.
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:2. **Unusual Activity Alerts**: Triggers a notification when a meter reading is significantly higher than the average of the last 3 readings (specifically, more than double the average).
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:3. **User-Specific Settings**: Each administrator can configure their own alert thresholds and preferences (e.g., enable/disable email or push notifications).
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:4. **Real-Time Monitoring**: The system checks for alerts asynchronously every time a new meter reading is recorded.
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:5. **Notification Center**: A dedicated UI view to manage and read notifications, accessible via the bell icon in the header or the sidebar.
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:## How It Works
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:### 1. Database Schema
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:- **`notification_settings`**: Stores user preferences, including `highConsumptionThreshold`, `unusualActivityAlerts`, `emailAlerts`, and `pushAlerts`.
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:- **`notifications`**: Stores the generated alerts, including `title`, `message`, `type` (`HIGH_CONSUMPTION` or `UNUSUAL_ACTIVITY`), and `isRead` status.
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:### 2. Alert Generation Logic
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:When a new meter reading is submitted via `POST /api/meters/:id/readings`, the system asynchronously calls the `checkConsumptionAndNotify` function.
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:This function:
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:1. Calculates the consumption (current reading - previous reading).
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:2. Retrieves all users and their notification settings.
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:3. For each user, checks if the consumption exceeds their `highConsumptionThreshold`.
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:4. Calculates the average of the last 3 consumptions. If the current consumption is > 2x the average, it flags it as unusual activity.
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:5. If either condition is met (and the user has the alert enabled), it inserts a new record into the `notifications` table.
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:### 3. Mock Email and Push Notifications
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:Currently, the system logs a message to the server console when an email or push notification would be sent. 
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:```typescript
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:if (user.emailAlerts !== 0) {
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:    console.log(`[MOCK EMAIL] Sending email to ${user.email}: [${title}] ${message}`);
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:}
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:if (user.pushAlerts === 1) {
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:    console.log(`[MOCK PUSH] Sending push notification to user ${user.id}: [${title}] ${message}`);
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:}
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:```
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:To implement real email or push notifications, you can replace these `console.log` statements in `server.ts` with actual integrations (e.g., Nodemailer, SendGrid, Firebase Cloud Messaging).
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:### 4. Frontend UI
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:- **Header**: A bell icon displays the count of unread notifications. It polls the server every 30 seconds to stay updated.
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:- **Notifications View**: Displays a list of all notifications, allowing users to mark them as read. It also includes a settings panel to configure the `highConsumptionThreshold` and toggle email/push alerts.
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:## Setup and Configuration
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:No additional environment variables are required for the basic notification system. The settings are managed entirely through the UI and stored in the SQLite database.
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:To configure alerts:
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:1. Log in to the application.
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:2. Click the bell icon in the header or select "Notifications" from the sidebar.
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:3. Adjust the "High Consumption Threshold" and toggle the desired alert types in the "Alert Settings" panel.
README-NOTIFICATIONS.md:4. Click "Save Settings".

README.md:# WABA - Smart Water Billing Dashboard
README.md:
README.md:This is a production-ready smart water billing system. It features a modern React frontend with Tailwind CSS and a high-performance Node.js backend using `better-sqlite3`.
README.md:
README.md:## 🛠️ System Architecture
README.md:
README.md:- **Frontend**: React 18, Tailwind CSS, Recharts (Data Viz), Framer Motion (Animations), @react-pdf/renderer (Invoicing).
README.md:- **Backend**: Node.js Express API.
README.md:- **Database**: SQLite (via `better-sqlite3`) - fast, serverless, and embedded.
README.md:- **AI Integration**: Google Gemini API for automated customer insights and a Voice Assistant.
README.md:
README.md:## 🚀 Getting Started
README.md:
README.md:### 1. Prerequisites
README.md:Ensure you have **Node.js 18+** installed on your machine.
README.md:
README.md:### 2. Installation
README.md:You need to install dependencies for both the root (frontend) and the server.
README.md:
README.md:```bash
README.md:# Install frontend dependencies
README.md:npm install
README.md:
README.md:# Install backend dependencies
README.md:cd server
README.md:npm install
README.md:cd ..
README.md:```
README.md:
README.md:### 3. Running the Project
README.md:The application requires both the API and the UI to be running simultaneously.
README.md:
README.md:#### Start the Backend (API)
README.md:In one terminal:
README.md:```bash
README.md:cd server
README.md:npm start
README.md:```
README.md:*Note: On first run, the server will automatically create `server/db/database.sqlite` and seed it with 50+ test customers, meters, and invoices.*
README.md:
README.md:#### Start the Frontend (UI)
README.md:In a second terminal:
README.md:```bash
README.md:npm run dev
README.md:# OR
README.md:npm start
README.md:```
README.md:
README.md:The dashboard will be available at `http://localhost:3000`.
README.md:
README.md:## 📂 Key Features
README.md:- **Live Assistant**: Voice-activated AI helper using Gemini 2.5 Flash Native Audio.
README.md:- **Bulk Billing Engine**: Automated consumption calculation and batch invoice generation.
README.md:- **Dynamic Invoicing**: Custom PDF generation with configurable themes and logos.
README.md:- **Database Diagnostics**: Real-time integrity checks and storage metrics.
README.md:- **NRW Tracking**: Specialized reporting for Non-Revenue Water analysis.
README.md:
README.md:## ⚙️ Configuration
README.md:- **API Port**: 3001
README.md:- **Database Path**: `server/db/database.sqlite`
README.md:- **Environment**: Ensure `process.env.API_KEY` is set for AI features.

transform.ts:
transform.ts:const project = new Project();
transform.ts:project.addSourceFileAtPath('server.ts');
transform.ts:const sourceFile = project.getSourceFileOrThrow('server.ts');
transform.ts:
transform.ts:// Find all db.prepare calls
transform.ts:const dbPrepareCalls = sourceFile.getDescendantsOfKind(SyntaxKind.CallExpression)
transform.ts:  .filter(call => {
transform.ts:    const expr = call.getExpression();
transform.ts:    if (expr.getKind() === SyntaxKind.PropertyAccessExpression) {
transform.ts:      const propAccess = expr as PropertyAccessExpression;
transform.ts:      return propAccess.getExpression().getText() === 'db' && propAccess.getName() === 'prepare';
transform.ts:    }
transform.ts:    return false;
transform.ts:  });
transform.ts:
transform.ts:for (const call of dbPrepareCalls) {
transform.ts:  const parent = call.getParent();
transform.ts:  if (parent && parent.getKind() === SyntaxKind.PropertyAccessExpression) {
transform.ts:    const propAccess = parent as PropertyAccessExpression;
transform.ts:    const grandParent = propAccess.getParent();
transform.ts:    if (grandParent && grandParent.getKind() === SyntaxKind.CallExpression) {
transform.ts:      const methodCall = grandParent as CallExpression;
transform.ts:      const methodName = propAccess.getName();
transform.ts:      if (['get', 'all', 'run'].includes(methodName)) {
transform.ts:        // Make sure the containing function is async
transform.ts:        let current = methodCall.getParent();
transform.ts:        while (current) {
transform.ts:          if (current.getKind() === SyntaxKind.ArrowFunction || current.getKind() === SyntaxKind.FunctionDeclaration || current.getKind() === SyntaxKind.FunctionExpression) {
transform.ts:            const func = current as any;
transform.ts:            if (!func.isAsync()) {
transform.ts:              func.setIsAsync(true);
transform.ts:            }
transform.ts:            break;
transform.ts:          }
transform.ts:          current = current.getParent();
transform.ts:        }
transform.ts:        
transform.ts:        if (methodCall.getParent()?.getKind() !== SyntaxKind.AwaitExpression) {
transform.ts:        }
transform.ts:      }
transform.ts:    }
transform.ts:  }
transform.ts:}
transform.ts:
transform.ts:const insertItemCalls = sourceFile.getDescendantsOfKind(SyntaxKind.CallExpression)
transform.ts:  .filter(call => {
transform.ts:    const expr = call.getExpression();
transform.ts:    if (expr.getKind() === SyntaxKind.PropertyAccessExpression) {
transform.ts:      const propAccess = expr as PropertyAccessExpression;
transform.ts:      return propAccess.getExpression().getText() === 'insertItem' && propAccess.getName() === 'run';
transform.ts:    }
transform.ts:    return false;
transform.ts:  });
transform.ts:
transform.ts:for (const call of insertItemCalls) {
transform.ts:  if (call.getParent()?.getKind() !== SyntaxKind.AwaitExpression) {
transform.ts:  }
transform.ts:}
transform.ts:
transform.ts:sourceFile.saveSync();
transform.ts:console.log('Transformation complete');
